org.springframework.data.jpa.domain.Specification;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class ShowSlotService {\n\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\n    private final ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository occurrenceRepository;\n    private final ShowSlotPricingTierRepository pricingTierRepository;\n    private final ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper;\n    private final VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient;\n    private final ConflictDetectionService conflictDetectionService;\n    private final EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService;\n    private final EbScheduleService ebScheduleService;\n    private final EbCapacityService ebCapacityService;\n    private final ShowSlotStateMachineService stateMachineService;\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n\n    public ShowSlotService(\n        ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository,\n        ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository occurrenceRepository,\n        ShowSlotPricingTierRepository pricingTierRepository,\n        ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper,\n        VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient,\n        ConflictDetectionService conflictDetectionService,\n        EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService,\n        EbScheduleService ebScheduleService,\n        EbCapacityService ebCapacityService,\n        ShowSlotStateMachineService stateMachineService,\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\n    ) {\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\n        this.occurrenceRepository = occurrenceRepository;\n        this.pricingTierRepository = pricingTierRepository;\n        this.showSlotMapper = showSlotMapper;\n        this.venueCatalogClient = venueCatalogClient;\n        this.conflictDetectionService = conflictDetectionService;\n        this.ebEventSyncService = ebEventSyncService;\n        this.ebScheduleService = ebScheduleService;\n        this.ebCapacityService = ebCapacityService;\n        this.stateMachineService = stateMachineService;\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot createSlot(Long organizationId, CreateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        CatalogVenueResponse venue = venueCatalogClient.getVenue(request.venueId());\n        validateCreateRequest(venue, request);\n        conflictDetectionService.validateOrThrow(organizationId, venue, request.startTime(), request.endTime());\n\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotMapper.toEntity(organizationId, request.venueId(), venue.cityId(), request);\n        List<ShowSlotPricingTier> tiers = showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers());\n        tiers.forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n\n        return showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot submitSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.SUBMIT);\n\n        CatalogVenueResponse venue = venueCatalogClient.getVenue(slot.getVenueId());\n        if (venue.eventbriteVenueId() == null || venue.eventbriteVenueId().isBlank()) {\n            throw new com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException(\n                \"Cannot submit slot: venue not yet synced to Eventbrite\", \"VENUE_NOT_SYNCED\");\n        }\n\n        try {\n            EbEventDto created = ebEventSyncService.createDraft(organizationId, toEbCreateRequest(slot, venue));\n            slot.setEbEventId(created.id());\n            slot.markAttempted();\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(\n                slot.getId(),\n                slot.getEbEventId(),\n                slot.getPricingTiers().stream().map(ShowSlotPricingTier::getId).toList(),\n                slot.getSeatingMode(),\n                organizationId,\n                slot.getSourceSeatMapId()\n            ));\n            return slot;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw new IntegrationException(\"Failed to create Eventbrite draft\", \"EB_DRAFT_FAILED\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onTicketSyncComplete(TicketSyncCompletedEvent event) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(event.slotId());\n        Long organizationId = slot.getOrganizationId();\n        try {\n            ebEventSyncService.publishEvent(organizationId, event.ebEventId());\n            stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.EB_PUBLISHED);\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ShowSlotActivatedEvent(\n                slot.getId(),\n                slot.getEbEventId(),\n                organizationId,\n                slot.getVenueId(),\n                slot.getCityId(),\n                slot.getSeatingMode()\n            ));\n            if (slot.isRecurring() && slot.getRecurrenceRule() != null) {\n                EbScheduleResponse scheduleResponse = ebScheduleService.createSchedule(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getRecurrenceRule());\n                slot.setEbSeriesId(scheduleResponse.seriesId());\n                if (scheduleResponse.occurrences() != null) {\n                    int index = 1;\n                    for (var occurrence : scheduleResponse.occurrences()) {\n                        ShowSlotOccurrence child = new ShowSlotOccurrence(index++, occurrence.startTime(), occurrence.endTime());\n                        child.setEbEventId(occurrence.eventId());\n                        slot.addOccurrence(child);\n                    }\n                }\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            }\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw ex;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onTicketSyncFailed(TicketSyncFailedEvent event) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(event.slotId());\n        slot.recordSyncFailure(event.reason());\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), event.reason()));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlotUpdateResult updateSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId, UpdateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Cannot update a cancelled slot\", \"SLOT_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot cannot be edited while sync is in progress (PENDING_SYNC)\", \"SLOT_PENDING_SYNC\");\n        }\n\n        if (request.startTime() != null || request.endTime() != null) {\n            CatalogVenueResponse venue = venueCatalogClient.getVenue(slot.getVenueId());\n            conflictDetectionService.validateOrThrow(organizationId, venue, request.startTime(), request.endTime(), slot.getId());\n        }\n\n        Integer previousCapacity = slot.getCapacity();\n        slot.updateDetails(request.title(), request.description(), request.startTime(), request.endTime(), request.capacity());\n\n        if (request.pricingTiers() != null) {\n            validatePricingTiers(request.pricingTiers());\n            slot.clearPricingTiers();\n            showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers()).forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n        }\n\n        slot = showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        boolean ebSyncFailed = false;\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE) {\n            try {\n                ebEventSyncService.updateEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), toEbUpdateRequest(slot));\n                if (request.capacity() != null && !request.capacity().equals(previousCapacity)) {\n                    ebCapacityService.updateCapacityTier(slot.getEbEventId(), request.capacity());\n                }\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n                ebSyncFailed = true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return new ShowSlotUpdateResult(slot, ebSyncFailed);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public boolean cancelSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot already cancelled\", \"SLOT_ALREADY_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n        stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.CANCEL);\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        boolean ebCancelled = true;\n        try {\n            if (slot.getEbEventId() != null) {\n                ebEventSyncService.cancelEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId());\n            }\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n"
  }
}

ShowSlotService {\n\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\n    private final ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository occurrenceRepository;\n    private final ShowSlotPricingTierRepository pricingTierRepository;\n    private final ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper;\n    private final VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient;\n    private final ConflictDetectionService conflictDetectionService;\n    private final EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService;\n    private final EbScheduleService ebScheduleService;\n    private final EbCapacityService ebCapacityService;\n    private final ShowSlotStateMachineService stateMachineService;\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n\n    public ShowSlotService(\n        ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository,\n        ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository occurrenceRepository,\n        ShowSlotPricingTierRepository pricingTierRepository,\n        ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper,\n        VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient,\n        ConflictDetectionService conflictDetectionService,\n        EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService,\n        EbScheduleService ebScheduleService,\n        EbCapacityService ebCapacityService,\n        ShowSlotStateMachineService stateMachineService,\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\n    ) {\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\n        this.occurrenceRepository = occurrenceRepository;\n        this.pricingTierRepository = pricingTierRepository;\n        this.showSlotMapper = showSlotMapper;\n        this.venueCatalogClient = venueCatalogClient;\n        this.conflictDetectionService = conflictDetectionService;\n        this.ebEventSyncService = ebEventSyncService;\n        this.ebScheduleService = ebScheduleService;\n        this.ebCapacityService = ebCapacityService;\n        this.stateMachineService = stateMachineService;\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot createSlot(Long organizationId, CreateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        CatalogVenueResponse venue = venueCatalogClient.getVenue(request.venueId());\n        validateCreateRequest(venue, request);\n        conflictDetectionService.validateOrThrow(organizationId, venue, request.startTime(), request.endTime());\n\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotMapper.toEntity(organizationId, request.venueId(), venue.cityId(), request);\n        List<ShowSlotPricingTier> tiers = showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers());\n        tiers.forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n\n        return showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot submitSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.SUBMIT);\n\n        CatalogVenueResponse venue = venueCatalogClient.getVenue(slot.getVenueId());\n        if (venue.eventbriteVenueId() == null || venue.eventbriteVenueId().isBlank()) {\n            throw new com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException(\n                \"Cannot submit slot: venue not yet synced to Eventbrite\", \"VENUE_NOT_SYNCED\");\n        }\n\n        try {\n            EbEventDto created = ebEventSyncService.createDraft(organizationId, toEbCreateRequest(slot, venue));\n            slot.setEbEventId(created.id());\n            slot.markAttempted();\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(\n                slot.getId(),\n                slot.getEbEventId(),\n                slot.getPricingTiers().stream().map(ShowSlotPricingTier::getId).toList(),\n                slot.getSeatingMode(),\n                organizationId,\n                slot.getSourceSeatMapId()\n            ));\n            return slot;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw new IntegrationException(\"Failed to create Eventbrite draft\", \"EB_DRAFT_FAILED\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onTicketSyncComplete(TicketSyncCompletedEvent event) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(event.slotId());\n        Long organizationId = slot.getOrganizationId();\n        try {\n            ebEventSyncService.publishEvent(organizationId, event.ebEventId());\n            stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.EB_PUBLISHED);\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ShowSlotActivatedEvent(\n                slot.getId(),\n                slot.getEbEventId(),\n                organizationId,\n                slot.getVenueId(),\n                slot.getCityId(),\n                slot.getSeatingMode()\n            ));\n            if (slot.isRecurring() && slot.getRecurrenceRule() != null) {\n                EbScheduleResponse scheduleResponse = ebScheduleService.createSchedule(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getRecurrenceRule());\n                slot.setEbSeriesId(scheduleResponse.seriesId());\n                if (scheduleResponse.occurrences() != null) {\n                    int index = 1;\n                    for (var occurrence : scheduleResponse.occurrences()) {\n                        ShowSlotOccurrence child = new ShowSlotOccurrence(index++, occurrence.startTime(), occurrence.endTime());\n                        child.setEbEventId(occurrence.eventId());\n                        slot.addOccurrence(child);\n                    }\n                }\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            }\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw ex;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onTicketSyncFailed(TicketSyncFailedEvent event) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(event.slotId());\n        slot.recordSyncFailure(event.reason());\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), event.reason()));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlotUpdateResult updateSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId, UpdateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Cannot update a cancelled slot\", \"SLOT_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot cannot be edited while sync is in progress (PENDING_SYNC)\", \"SLOT_PENDING_SYNC\");\n        }\n\n        if (request.startTime() != null || request.endTime() != null) {\n            CatalogVenueResponse venue = venueCatalogClient.getVenue(slot.getVenueId());\n            conflictDetectionService.validateOrThrow(organizationId, venue, request.startTime(), request.endTime(), slot.getId());\n        }\n\n        Integer previousCapacity = slot.getCapacity();\n        slot.updateDetails(request.title(), request.description(), request.startTime(), request.endTime(), request.capacity());\n\n        if (request.pricingTiers() != null) {\n            validatePricingTiers(request.pricingTiers());\n            slot.clearPricingTiers();\n            showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers()).forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n        }\n\n        slot = showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        boolean ebSyncFailed = false;\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE) {\n            try {\n                ebEventSyncService.updateEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), toEbUpdateRequest(slot));\n                if (request.capacity() != null && !request.capacity().equals(previousCapacity)) {\n                    ebCapacityService.updateCapacityTier(slot.getEbEventId(), request.capacity());\n                }\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n                ebSyncFailed = true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return new ShowSlotUpdateResult(slot, ebSyncFailed);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public boolean cancelSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot already cancelled\", \"SLOT_ALREADY_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n        stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.CANCEL);\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        boolean ebCancelled = true;\n        try {\n            if (slot.getEbEventId() != null) {\n                ebEventSyncService.cancelEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId());\n            }\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n"
  }
}

## Entry 115
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T12:35:20.992Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:35:20.992Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_s1x9SI1kPzRmy2zRsRzh2Yy1",
    "output": "Chunk ID: ef2db5\nWall time: 0.0510 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1662\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.request.EbInventoryTierRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbInventoryTierResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.request.EbTicketClassRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbTicketClassResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Qualifier;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatusCode;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\n\n@Service\npublic class DefaultEbTicketService implements EbTicketService {\n\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DefaultEbTicketService.class);\n\n    private final RestClient client;\n\n    public DefaultEbTicketService(@Qualifier(\"ebRestClient\") RestClient client) {\n        this.client = client;\n    }\n\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\n    private record TicketClassListResponse(List<EbTicketClassResponse> ticketClasses) {}\n\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\n    private record InventoryTierListResponse(List<EbInventoryTierResponse> inventoryTiers) {}\n\n    @Override\n    public List<EbTicketClassResponse> createTicketClasses(String eventId, List<EbTicketClassRequest> ticketClasses) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Creating {} ticket class(es) for eventId={}\", ticketClasses.size(), eventId);\n            var results = new java.util.ArrayList<EbTicketClassResponse>();\n            for (EbTicketClassRequest tc : ticketClasses) {\n                EbTicketClassResponse resp = client.post()\n                    .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n                    .body(Map.of(\"ticket_class\", toTicketClassMap(tc)))\n                    .retrieve()\n                    .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createTicketClass failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                    })\n                    .body(EbTicketClassResponse.class);\n                if (resp != null) results.add(resp);\n            }\n            return results;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createTicketClasses error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public List<EbInventoryTierResponse> createInventoryTiers(String eventId, List<EbInventoryTierRequest> tiers) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Creating {} inventory tier(s) for eventId={}\", tiers.size(), eventId);\n            var results = new java.util.ArrayList<EbInventoryTierResponse>();\n            for (EbInventoryTierRequest tier : tiers) {\n                // Eventbrite inventory tiers are created as ticket classes with additional metadata\n                EbInventoryTierResponse resp = client.post()\n                    .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n                    .body(Map.of(\"ticket_class\", Map.of(\n                        \"name\", tier.name(),\n                        \"quantity_total\", tier.quantity()\n                    )))\n                    .retrieve()\n                    .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createInventoryTier failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                    })\n                    .body(EbInventoryTierResponse.class);\n                if (resp != null) results.add(resp);\n            }\n            return results;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createInventoryTiers error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public String copySeatMap(String eventId, String sourceSeatMapId) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Copying seatmap for eventId={} from sourceSeatMapId={}\", eventId, sourceSeatMapId);\n            // Eventbrite seatmap copy endpoint\n            var resp = client.post()\n                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/\", eventId)\n                .body(Map.of(\"event\", Map.of(\"is_reserved_seating\", true, \"show_pick_a_seat\", true)))\n                .retrieve()\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB copySeatMap failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                })\n                .body(Map.class);\n            return sourceSeatMapId; // mock doesn't support seatmap copy; return source ID\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB copySeatMap error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private Map<String, Object> toTicketClassMap(EbTicketClassRequest tc) {\n        var map = new java.util.LinkedHashMap<String, Object>();\n        map.put(\"name\", tc.name());\n        if (tc.price() != null) {\n            // Eventbrite cost format: \"USD,1000\" (currency,cents)\n            long cents = tc.price().amount().multiply(java.math.BigDecimal.valueOf(100)).longValue();\n            map.put(\"cost\", tc.price().currency() + \",\" + cents);\n            map.put(\"free\", cents == 0);\n        }\n        if (tc.quantity() != null) map.put(\"quantity_total\", tc.quantity());\n        return map;\n    }\n}\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.config;\n\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpHeaders;\nimport org.springframework.http.MediaType;\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\n\n/**\n * Provides a pre-configured {@link RestClient} for all Eventbrite facade implementations.\n * Base URL and Authorization header are applied from {@link EbProperties}.\n */\n@Configuration\npublic class EbRestClientConfig {\n\n    @Bean(name = \"ebRestClient\")\n    public RestClient ebRestClient(EbProperties props, RestClient.Builder builder) {\n        return builder\n            .baseUrl(props.getBaseUrl())\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.AUTHORIZATION, \"Bearer \" + props.getApiKey())\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.CONTENT_TYPE, MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.ACCEPT, MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)\n            .build();\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

)))\n                    .retrieve()\n                    .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createInventoryTier failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                    })\n                    .body(EbInventoryTierResponse.class);\n                if (resp != null) results.add(resp);\n            }\n            return results;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createInventoryTiers error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public String copySeatMap(String eventId, String sourceSeatMapId) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Copying seatmap for eventId={} from sourceSeatMapId={}\", eventId, sourceSeatMapId);\n            // Eventbrite seatmap copy endpoint\n            var resp = client.post()\n                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/\", eventId)\n                .body(Map.of(\"event\", Map.of(\"is_reserved_seating\", true, \"show_pick_a_seat\", true)))\n                .retrieve()\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB copySeatMap failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                })\n                .body(Map.class);\n            return sourceSeatMapId; // mock doesn't support seatmap copy; return source ID\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB copySeatMap error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private Map<String, Object> toTicketClassMap(EbTicketClassRequest tc) {\n        var map = new java.util.LinkedHashMap<String, Object>();\n        map.put(\"name\", tc.name());\n        if (tc.price() != null) {\n            // Eventbrite cost format: \"USD,1000\" (currency,cents)\n            long cents = tc.price().amount().multiply(java.math.BigDecimal.valueOf(100)).longValue();\n            map.put(\"cost\", tc.price().currency() + \",\" + cents);\n            map.put(\"free\", cents == 0);\n        }\n        if (tc.quantity() != null) map.put(\"quantity_total\", tc.quantity());\n        return map;\n    }\n}\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.config;\n\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpHeaders;\nimport org.springframework.http.MediaType;\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\n\n/**\n * Provides a pre-configured {@link RestClient} for all Eventbrite facade implementations.\n * Base URL and Authorization header are applied from {@link EbProperties}.\n */\n@Configuration\npublic class EbRestClientConfig {\n\n    @Bean(name = \"ebRestClient\")\n    public RestClient ebRestClient(EbProperties props, RestClient.Builder builder) {\n        return builder\n            .baseUrl(props.getBaseUrl())\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.AUTHORIZATION, \"Bearer \" + props.getApiKey())\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.CONTENT_TYPE, MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.ACCEPT, MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)\n            .build();\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 130
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T12:35:37.350Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:35:37.350Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_kSnYpmY0B90FXN4WrXfwl0As",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 5b7812\nWall time: 0.0521 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 376\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.config;\n\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.jsr310.JavaTimeModule;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisConnectionFactory;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.StringRedisSerializer;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate;\n\n@Configuration\npublic class RedisConfig {\n\n    @Bean\n    public ObjectMapper redisObjectMapper() {\n        ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();\n        mapper.registerModule(new JavaTimeModule());\n        return mapper;\n    }\n\n    @Bean\n    public RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate(\n        RedisConnectionFactory connectionFactory,\n        ObjectMapper redisObjectMapper\n    ) {\n        RedisTemplate<String, Object> template = new RedisTemplate<>();\n        template.setConnectionFactory(connectionFactory);\n        GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer serializer = new GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer(redisObjectMapper);\n        template.setKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        template.setValueSerializer(serializer);\n        template.setHashKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        template.setHashValueSerializer(serializer);\n        template.afterPropertiesSet();\n        return template;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

{

    "output": "Chunk ID: 5b7812\nWall time: 0.0521 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 376\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.config;\n\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.jsr310.JavaTimeModule;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisConnectionFactory;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.StringRedisSerializer;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate;\n\n@Configuration\npublic class RedisConfig {\n\n    @Bean\n    public ObjectMapper redisObjectMapper() {\n        ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();\n        mapper.registerModule(new JavaTimeModule());\n        return mapper;\n    }\n\n    @Bean\n    public RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate(\n        RedisConnectionFactory connectionFactory,\n        ObjectMapper redisObjectMapper\n    ) {\n        RedisTemplate<String, Object> template = new RedisTemplate<>();\n        template.setConnectionFactory(connectionFactory);\n        GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer serializer = new GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer(redisObjectMapper);\n        template.setKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        template.setValueSerializer(serializer);\n        template.setHashKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        template.setHashValueSerializer(serializer);\n        template.afterPropertiesSet();\n        return template;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

showSlotService.submitSlot(organizationId, slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotSubmitResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getSyncAttemptCount(), \"EB sync ZonedDateTime startAfter,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n    ) {\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listSlots(organizationId, status, venueId, cityId, startAfter, page, size);\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ResponseEntity<ShowSlotResponse> updateSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId,\n        @Valid @RequestBody UpdateShowSlotRequest request\n    ) {\n        ShowSlotUpdateResult result = showSlotService.updateSlot(organizationId, slotId, request);\n   }

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:36:45.901Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_PHsjuaClHH6wKNzqmYGo0Lx6",
    "output": "Chunk ID: a615dd\nWall time: 0.0510 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 941\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine;\n\nimport java.util.EnumMap;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\n\n@Component\npublic class ShowSlotStateMachineConfig {\n\n    private final Map<ShowSlotState, Map<ShowSlotEvent, ShowSlotState>> transitions = new EnumMap<>(ShowSlotState.class);\n\n    public ShowSlotStateMachineConfig() {\n        transitions.put(ShowSlotState.DRAFT, Map.of(ShowSlotEvent.SUBMIT, ShowSlotState.PENDING_SYNC));\n        transitions.put(ShowSlotState.PENDING_SYNC, Map.of(\n            ShowSlotEvent.EB_PUBLISHED, ShowSlotState.ACTIVE,\n            ShowSlotEvent.EB_FAILED, ShowSlotState.PENDING_SYNC,\n            ShowSlotEvent.CANCEL, ShowSlotState.CANCELLED\n        ));\n        transitions.put(ShowSlotState.ACTIVE, Map.of(ShowSlotEvent.CANCEL, ShowSlotState.CANCELLED));\n        transitions.put(ShowSlotState.CANCELLED, Map.of());\n    }\n\n    public ShowSlotState nextState(ShowSlotState current, ShowSlotEvent event) {\n        return transitions.getOrDefault(current, Map.of()).get(event);\n    }\n}\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.action.SlotStatusUpdateAction;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.guard.SlotTransitionGuard;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n\n@Service\npublic class ShowSlotStateMachineService {\n\n    private final SlotTransitionGuard guard;\n    private final SlotStatusUpdateAction action;\n\n    public ShowSlotStateMachineService(SlotTransitionGuard guard, SlotStatusUpdateAction action) {\n        this.guard = guard;\n        this.action = action;\n    }\n\n    public void sendEvent(ShowSlot slot, ShowSlotEvent event) {\n        ShowSlotStatus nextStatus = guard.resolveNextStatus(slot.getStatus(), event);\n        if (nextStatus == null) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\n                \"Invalid slot transition: \" + slot.getStatus() + \" -> \" + event,\n                \"INVALID_SLOT_TRANSITION\"\n            );\n        }\n        action.apply(slot, nextStatus);\n    }\n}\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.guard;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotState;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotStateMachineConfig;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\n\n@Component\npublic class SlotTransitionGuard {\n\n    private final ShowSlotStateMachineConfig config;\n\n    public SlotTransitionGuard(ShowSlotStateMachineConfig config) {\n        this.config = config;\n    }\n\n    public ShowSlotStatus resolveNextStatus(ShowSlotStatus current, ShowSlotEvent event) {\n        ShowSlotState currentState = ShowSlotState.valueOf(current.name());\n        ShowSlotState next = config.nextState(currentState, event);\n        if (next == null) {\n            return null;\n        }\n        return ShowSlotStatus.valueOf(next.name());\n    }\n}\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.action;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\n\n@Component\npublic class SlotStatusUpdateAction {\n\n    public void apply(ShowSlot slot, ShowSlotStatus targetStatus) {\n        switch (targetStatus) {\n            case PENDING_SYNC -> slot.markPendingSync();\n            case ACTIVE -> slot.markActive();\n            case CANCELLED -> slot.markCancelled();\n            case DRAFT -> { }\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

}\n}\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.guard;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotState;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotStateMachineConfig;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\n\n@Component\npublic class SlotTransitionGuard {\n\n    private final ShowSlotStateMachineConfig config;\n\n    public SlotTransitionGuard(ShowSlotStateMachineConfig config) {\n        this.config = config;\n    }\n\n    public ShowSlotStatus resolveNextStatus(ShowSlotStatus current, ShowSlotEvent event) {\n        ShowSlotState currentState = ShowSlotState.valueOf(current.name());\n        ShowSlotState next = config.nextState(currentState, event);\n        if (next == null) {\n            return null;\n        }\n        return ShowSlotStatus.valueOf(next.name());\n    }\n}\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.action;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\n\n@Component\npublic class SlotStatusUpdateAction {\n\n    public void apply(ShowSlot slot, ShowSlotStatus targetStatus) {\n        switch (targetStatus) {\n            case PENDING_SYNC -> slot.markPendingSync();\n            case ACTIVE -> slot.markActive();\n            case CANCELLED -> slot.markCancelled();\n            case DRAFT -> { }\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ConflictAlternativeDto;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotPricingTierResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.TimeWindowOptionDto;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.VenueOptionDto;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlotOccurrence;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlotPricingTier;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.TierType;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.ConflictAlternativeResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.TimeWindowOption;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.VenueOption;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport org.mapstruct.Mapper;\nimport org.mapstruct.Mapping;\n\n@Mapper(componentModel = \"spring\")\npublic interface ShowSlotMapper {\n\n    @Mapping(target = \"pricingTiers\", expression = \"java(mapPricingTiers(slot.getPricingTiers()))\")\n    ShowSlotResponse toResponse(ShowSlot slot);\n\n    ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse toOccurrenceResponse(ShowSlotOccurrence occurrence);\n\n    @Mapping(target = \"priceAmount\", source = \"price.amount\")\n    @Mapping(target = \"currency\", source = \"price.currency\")\n    ShowSlotPricingTierResponse toPricingTierResponse(ShowSlotPricingTier tier);\n\n    default List<ShowSlotPricingTierResponse> mapPricingTiers(List<ShowSlotPricingTier> tiers) {\n        return tiers == null ? List.of() : tiers.stream().map(this::toPricingTierResponse).toList();\n    }\n\n    default ShowSlot toEntity(Long organizationId, Long venueId, Long cityId, CreateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        return new ShowSlot(\n            organizationId,\n            venueId,\n            cityId,\n            request.title(),\n            request.description(),\n            request.startTime(),\n            request.endTime(),\n            request.seatingMode(),\n            request.capacity(),\n            Boolean.TRUE.equals(request.isRecurring()),\n            request.recurrenceRule(),\n            request.sourceSeatMapId()\n        );\n    }\n\n    default List<ShowSlotPricingTier> toPricingTiers(List<PricingTierRequest> tiers) {\n        if (tiers == null) {\n            return List.of();\n        }\n        return tiers.stream().map(this::toPricingTier).toList();\n    }\n\n    default ShowSlotPricingTier toPricingTier(PricingTierRequest request) {\n        Money price = new Money(request.priceAmount(), request.currency());\n        TierType type = request.tierType();\n        return new ShowSlotPricingTier(request.name(), price, request.quota(), type);\n    }\n\n    default ConflictAlternativeDto toConflictDto(ConflictAlternativeResponse response) {\n        return new ConflictAlternativeDto(\n            mapTimeWindows(response.sameVenueAlternatives()),\n            mapVenues(response.nearbyVenueAlternatives()),\n            mapTimeWindows(response.adjustedTimeOptions())\n        );\n    }\n\n    default List<TimeWindowOptionDto> mapTimeWindows(List<TimeWindowOption> options) {\n        if (options == null) {\n            return List.of();\n        }\n        return options.stream().map(this::toTimeWindowDto).toList();\n    }\n\n    default TimeWindowOptionDto toTimeWindowDto(TimeWindowOption option) {\n        return new TimeWindowOptionDto(option.proposedStart(), option.proposedEnd());\n    }\n\n    default List<VenueOptionDto> mapVenues(List<VenueOption> options) {\n        if (options == null) {\n            return List.of();\n        }\n        return options.stream().map(this::toVenueDto).toList();\n    }\n\n    default VenueOptionDto toVenueDto(VenueOption option) {\n        return new VenueOptionDto(option.venueId(), option.venueName(), option.city(), option.capacity());\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

    "output": "Chunk ID: 7f1ee6\nWall time: 0.0519 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 896\nOutput:\n-- owner: scheduling module\nCREATE TABLE show_slot (\n    id                    BIGSERIAL    PRIMARY KEY,\n    organization_id       BIGINT       NOT NULL,\n    venue_id              BIGINT       NOT NULL,\n    city_id               BIGINT       NOT NULL,\n    title                 VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,\n    description           TEXT,\n    start_time            TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL,\n    end_time              TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL,\n    seating_mode          VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL\n                           CONSTRAINT chk_slot_seating_mode CHECK (seating_mode IN ('GA', 'RESERVED')),\n    capacity              INTEGER      NOT NULL,\n    source_seatmap_id     VARCHAR(255),\n    is_recurring          BOOLEAN      NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,\n    recurrence_rule       TEXT,\n    status                VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT'\n                           CONSTRAINT chk_slot_status CHECK (status IN ('DRAFT', 'PENDING_SYNC', 'ACTIVE', 'CANCELLED')),\n    eb_event_id           VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,\n    eb_series_id          VARCHAR(255),\n    sync_attempt_count    INTEGER      NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\n    last_sync_error       TEXT,\n    last_attempted_at     TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    created_at            TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at            TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n\n    CONSTRAINT fk_show_slot_org   FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organization(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    CONSTRAINT fk_show_slot_venue FOREIGN KEY (venue_id)        REFERENCES venue(id)        ON DELETE RESTRICT,\n    CONSTRAINT fk_show_slot_city  FOREIGN KEY (city_id)         REFERENCES city(id)         ON DELETE RESTRICT,\n    CONSTRAINT chk_slot_times     CHECK (end_time > start_time),\n    CONSTRAINT chk_slot_capacity  CHECK (capacity > 0)\n);\n\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_org_id     ON show_slot(organization_id);\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_venue_id   ON show_slot(venue_id);\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_city_id    ON show_slot(city_id);\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_status     ON show_slot(status);\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_eb_event   ON show_slot(eb_event_id);\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_venue_time ON show_slot(venue_id, start_time, end_time);\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_active_eb  ON show_slot(status, eb_event_id);\nCREATE INDEX idx_show_slot_org_city   ON show_slot(organization_id, city_id);\n-- owner: scheduling module\nCREATE TABLE show_slot_pricing_tier (\n    id                    BIGSERIAL    PRIMARY KEY,\n    slot_id               BIGINT       NOT NULL,\n    name                  VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    price_amount          DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,\n    currency              VARCHAR(3)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',\n    quota                 INTEGER      NOT NULL,\n    tier_type             VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PAID'\n                           CONSTRAINT chk_tier_type CHECK (tier_type IN ('FREE', 'PAID', 'DONATION')),\n    eb_ticket_class_id    VARCHAR(255),\n    eb_inventory_tier_id  VARCHAR(255),\n    created_at            TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at            TIMESTAMPTZ  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n\n    CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_tier_slot FOREIGN KEY (slot_id)\n        REFERENCES show_slot(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    CONSTRAINT chk_quota_positive   CHECK (quota > 0),\n    CONSTRAINT chk_price_free       CHECK (\n        (tier_type = 'FREE' AND price_amount = 0.00) OR\n        (tier_type != 'FREE')\n    )\n);\n\nCREATE INDEX idx_pricing_tier_slot   ON show_slot_pricing_tier(slot_id);\nCREATE INDEX idx_pricing_tier_eb     ON show_slot_pricing_tier(eb_ticket_class_id);\n"
  }
}

## Entry 218
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T12:37:22.512Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:37:22.512Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "update_plan",
    "arguments": "{\"explanation\":\"I reviewed SPEC_4 plus current module state. booking-inventory currently only has ticket sync; FR4 requires a new data model, migrations, APIs, services, and listeners. payments-ticketing module does not exist yet, so I’ll implement booking-inventory-owned features and shared event contracts needed for future consumers.\", \"plan\":[{\"step\":\"Audit current booking-inventory/shared/app state against SPEC_4 requirements and identify feasible implementation scope in this codebase\",\"status\":\"completed\"},{\"step\":\"Implement FR4 core data model and persistence (entities, enums, repositories, migrations V19-V24) in booking-inventory/app\",\"status\":\"in_progress\"},{\"step\":\"Implement seat/cart APIs and orchestration services (availability, add/remove seat, confirm, pricing recompute, event publishing, supporting clients/mappers/exceptions)\",\"status\":\"pending\"},{\"step\":\"Wire listeners/jobs/state transition helpers needed for slot activation and payment failure/confirm events, then run module tests/compile\",\"status\":\"pending\"}]}",
    "call_id": "call_ty3xg6s4pbwJCTh6AMlRKKVd"
  }
}
```

<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>\n         </dependency>\n+        <dependency>\n+            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\n+            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId>\n+        </dependency>\n+        <dependency>\n+            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\n+            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-redis</artifactId>\n+        </dependency>\n         <dependency>\n             <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\n             <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId>\n         </dependency>\n+        <dependency>\n+            <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>\n+            <artifactId>mapstruct</artifactId>\n+        </dependency>\n+\n+        <dependency>\n+            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>\n+            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>\n+            <optional>true</optional>\n+        </dependency>\n \n         <dependency>\n             <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\n             <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>\n             <scope>test</scope>\n@@\n         <dependency>\n             <groupId>com.tngtech.archunit</groupId>\n             <artifactId>archunit-junit5</artifactId>\n             <scope>test</scope>\n         </dependency>\n+        <dependency>\n+            <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId>\n+            <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId>\n+            <scope>test</scope>\n+        </dependency>\n     </dependencies>\n+\n+    <build>\n+        <plugins>\n+            <plugin>\n+                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>\n+                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>\n+                <configuration>\n+                    <annotationProcessorPaths>\n+                        <path>\n+                            <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>\n+                            <artifactId>mapstruct-processor</artifactId>\n+                            <version>${mapstruct.version}</version>\n+                        </path>\n+                        <path>\n+                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>\n+                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>\n+                        </path>\n+                    </annotationProcessorPaths>\n+                </configuration>\n+            </plugin>\n+        </plugins>\n+    </build>\n </project>\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}

    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/domain/enums/SeatLockState.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums;\\n\\npublic enum SeatLockState {\\n    AVAILABLE,\\n    SOFT_LOCKED,\\n    HARD_LOCKED,\\n    PAYMENT_PENDING,\\n    CONFIRMED,\\n    RELEASED\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/domain/enums/SeatLockEvent.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums;\\n\\npublic enum SeatLockEvent {\\n    SELECT,\\n    CONFIRM,\\n    CHECKOUT_INITIATE,\\n    CONFIRM_PAYMENT,\\n    RELEASE\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/domain/enums/CartStatus.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums;\\n\\npublic enum CartStatus {\\n    PENDING,\\n    CONFIRMED,\\n    ABANDONED,\\n    EXPIRED\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/domain/enums/LockReleaseReason.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums;\\n\\npublic enum LockReleaseReason {\\n    TTL_EXPIRED,\\n    USER_REMOVED,\\n    CART_ABANDONED,\\n    PAYMENT_FAILED,\\n    ORDER_ABANDONED,\\n    PAYMENT_TIMEOUT,\\n    TIER_SOLD_OUT\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_a7Npmt2uJf0zalSgeW5EOFZ8"
  }
}

\\\"section\\\")\\n    private String section;\\n\\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\\n    @Column(name = \\\"lock_state\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private SeatLockState lockState;\\n\\n \\\"eb_order_id\\\")\\n    private String ebOrderId;\\n\\n    protected Seat() {\\n    }\\n\\n    public Seat(Long showSlotId, Long pricingTierId, String ebTicketClassId, String seatNumber, String rowLabel, String section) {\\n        this.showSlotId = showSlotId;\\n        this.pricingTierId = pricingTierId;\\n        this.ebTicketClassId = ebTicketClassId;\\n        this.seatNumber = seatNumber;\\n        this.rowLabel = rowLabel;\\n        this.section = section;\\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.AVAILABLE;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void softLock(Long userId, Duration ttl) {\\n        if (!isSelectable(Instant.now())) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Seat is not available for soft lock\\\", \\\"SEAT_UNAVAILABLE\\\");\\n        }\\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED;\\n        this.lockedByUserId = userId;\\n        this.lockedUntil = Instant.now().plus(ttl);\\n    }\\n\\n    public void hardLock(Duration ttl) {\\n        if (this.lockState != SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Seat is not soft-locked\\\", \\\"INVALID_SEAT_TRANSITION\\\");\\n        }\\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED;\\n        this.lockedUntil = Instant.now().plus(ttl);\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markPaymentPending() {\\n        if (this.lockState != SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Seat is not hard-locked\\\", \\\"INVALID_SEAT_TRANSITION\\\");\\n        }\\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.PAYMENT_PENDING;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void confirm(String orderId) {\\n        if (this.lockState != SeatLockState.PAYMENT_PENDING && this.lockState != SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Seat cannot be confirmed from current state\\\", \\\"INVALID_SEAT_TRANSITION\\\");\\n        }\\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.CONFIRMED;\\n        this.ebOrderId = orderId;\\n        this.lockedByUserId = null;\\n        this.lockedUntil = null;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void release(LockReleaseReason reason) {\\n        if (this.lockState == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Confirmed seat cannot be released\\\", \\\"SEAT_ALREADY_CONFIRMED\\\");\\n        }\\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.AVAILABLE;\\n        this.lockedByUserId = null;\\n        this.lockedUntil = null;\\n    }\\n\\n    public boolean isSelectable(Instant now) {\\n        if (this.lockState == SeatLockState.AVAILABLE) {\\n            return true;\\n        }\\n        return this.lockState == SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED\\n            && this.lockedUntil != null\\n            && this.lockedUntil.isBefore(now);\\n    }\\n\\n    public Long getShowSlotId() {\\n        return showSlotId;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Long getPricingTierId() {\\n        return pricingTierId;\\n getRowLabel() {\\n        return rowLabel;\\n    }\\n\\n    public String getSection() {\\n        return section;\\n    }\\n\\n    public SeatLockState getLockState() {\\n        return lockState;\\n @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\\n    @Column(name = \\\"lock_state\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private SeatLockState lockState;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"locked_until\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private Instant lockedUntil;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"eb_order_id\\\")\\n    private String ebOrderId;\\n\\n    protected GaInventoryClaim() {\\n    }\\n\\n    public GaInventoryClaim(Long showSlotId, Long pricingTierId, Long userId, Long cartId, Integer quantity, Instant lockedUntil) {\\n        this.showSlotId = showSlotId;\\n        this.pricingTierId = pricingTierId;\\n        this.userId = userId;\\n        this.cartId = cartId;\\n        this.quantity = quantity;\\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED;\\n        this.lockedUntil = lockedUntil;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void hardLock(Instant lockUntil) {\\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED;\\n        this.lockedUntil = lockUntil;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void confirm(String orderId) {\\n \\\"carts\\\")\\npublic class Cart extends BaseEntity {\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"user_id\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private Long userId;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"show_slot_id\\\", nullable = \\\"seating_mode\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private SeatingMode seatingMode;\\n\\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\\n    @Column(name = \\\"status\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private CartStatus \\\"currency\\\", column = @Column(name = \\\"currency\\\", nullable = false))\\n    })\\n    private Money discountAmount;\\n\\n    @OneToMany(mappedBy = \\\"cart\\\", cascade = CascadeType.ALL, **Role/Type:** response_item

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:40:26.531Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V19__create_seats.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE seats (\\n    id                  BIGSERIAL     PRIMARY KEY,\\n    show_slot_id        BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    pricing_tier_id     BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    eb_ticket_class_id  VARCHAR(255)  NOT NULL,\\n    seat_number         VARCHAR(20)   NOT NULL,\\n    row_label           VARCHAR(10),\\n    section             VARCHAR(100),\\n    lock_state          VARCHAR(20)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 'AVAILABLE'\\n                         CONSTRAINT chk_seat_lock_state CHECK (lock_state IN ('AVAILABLE', 'SOFT_LOCKED', 'HARD_LOCKED', 'PAYMENT_PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'RELEASED')),\\n    locked_by_user_id   BIGINT,\\n    locked_until        TIMESTAMPTZ,\\n    eb_order_id         VARCHAR(255),\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT uq_seat_position UNIQUE (show_slot_id, seat_number)\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_seats_slot_state   ON seats(show_slot_id, lock_state);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_seats_locked_until ON seats(locked_until);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_seats_user_lock    ON seats(locked_by_user_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_seats_eb_order     ON seats(eb_order_id);\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V20__create_ga_inventory_claims.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE ga_inventory_claims (\\n    id                  BIGSERIAL     PRIMARY KEY,\\n    show_slot_id        BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    pricing_tier_id     BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    user_id             BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    cart_id             BIGINT,\\n    quantity            INTEGER       NOT NULL CHECK (quantity > 0),\\n    lock_state          VARCHAR(20)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SOFT_LOCKED'\\n                         CONSTRAINT chk_ga_lock_state CHECK (lock_state IN ('AVAILABLE', 'SOFT_LOCKED', 'HARD_LOCKED', 'PAYMENT_PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'RELEASED')),\\n    locked_until        TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL,\\n    eb_order_id         VARCHAR(255),\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT uq_ga_claim_user_tier UNIQUE (show_slot_id, pricing_tier_id, user_id, cart_id)\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_ga_claim_slot_tier ON ga_inventory_claims(show_slot_id, pricing_tier_id, lock_state);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_ga_claim_user      ON ga_inventory_claims(user_id, lock_state);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_ga_claim_expiry    ON ga_inventory_claims(locked_until, lock_state);\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V21__create_carts.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE carts (\\n    id              BIGSERIAL      PRIMARY KEY,\\n    user_id         BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    show_slot_id    BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    org_id          BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    seating_mode    VARCHAR(20)    NOT NULL\\n                     CONSTRAINT chk_cart_seating_mode CHECK (seating_mode IN ('RESERVED', 'GA')),\\n    status          VARCHAR(20)    NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING'\\n                     CONSTRAINT chk_cart_status CHECK (status IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'ABANDONED', 'EXPIRED')),\\n    expires_at      TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL,\\n    coupon_code     VARCHAR(100),\\n    discount_amount DECIMAL(12,2)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,\\n    currency        VARCHAR(3)     NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',\\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\\n);\\n\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_cart_user_slot_pending\\n    ON carts(user_id, show_slot_id)\\n    WHERE status = 'PENDING';\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_user   ON carts(user_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_slot   ON carts(show_slot_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_status ON carts(status);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_expiry ON carts(expires_at, status);\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V22__create_cart_items.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE cart_items (\\n    id                  BIGSERIAL      PRIMARY KEY,\\n    cart_id             BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    seat_id             BIGINT,\\n    ga_claim_id         BIGINT,\\n    pricing_tier_id     BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    eb_ticket_class_id  VARCHAR(255)   NOT NULL,\\n    base_price_amount   DECIMAL(12,2)  NOT NULL,\\n    currency            VARCHAR(3)     NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',\\n    quantity            INTEGER        NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (quantity > 0),\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_cart_item_cart     FOREIGN KEY (cart_id)     REFERENCES carts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_cart_item_seat     FOREIGN KEY (seat_id)     REFERENCES seats(id),\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_cart_item_ga_claim FOREIGN KEY (ga_claim_id) REFERENCES ga_inventory_claims(id),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_cart_item_mode CHECK (\\n        (seat_id IS NOT NULL AND ga_claim_id IS NULL)\\n        OR (seat_id IS NULL AND ga_claim_id IS NOT NULL)\\n    )\\n);\\n\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_cart_item_cart_seat ON cart_items(cart_id, seat_id) WHERE seat_id IS NOT NULL;\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_item_cart ON cart_items(cart_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_item_seat ON cart_items(seat_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_item_tier ON cart_items(pricing_tier_id);\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V23__create_group_discount_rules.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE group_discount_rules (\\n    id                        BIGSERIAL     PRIMARY KEY,\\n    show_slot_id              BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    pricing_tier_id           BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    group_discount_threshold  INTEGER       NOT NULL,\\n    group_discount_percent    DECIMAL(5,2)  NOT NULL,\\n    created_at                TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at                TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT uq_discount_rule_tier UNIQUE (show_slot_id, pricing_tier_id)\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_group_discount_slot_tier ON group_discount_rules(show_slot_id, pricing_tier_id);\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V24__create_seat_lock_audit_log.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE seat_lock_audit_log (\\n    id              BIGSERIAL      PRIMARY KEY,\\n    seat_id         BIGINT,\\n    ga_claim_id     BIGINT,\\n    show_slot_id    BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    user_id         BIGINT,\\n    from_state      VARCHAR(20),\\n    to_state        VARCHAR(20)    NOT NULL,\\n    event_type      VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,\\n    reason          VARCHAR(500),\\n    eb_order_id     VARCHAR(255),\\n    occurred_at     TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_audit_from_state CHECK (from_state IS NULL OR from_state IN ('AVAILABLE', 'SOFT_LOCKED', 'HARD_LOCKED', 'PAYMENT_PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'RELEASED')),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_audit_to_state   CHECK (to_state IN ('AVAILABLE', 'SOFT_LOCKED', 'HARD_LOCKED', 'PAYMENT_PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'RELEASED'))\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_audit_seat     ON seat_lock_audit_log(seat_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_audit_slot     ON seat_lock_audit_log(show_slot_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_audit_user     ON seat_lock_audit_log(user_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_audit_occurred ON seat_lock_audit_log(occurred_at);\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_76PtXtzzdan5AWX1dX4Aqn9t"

    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V19__create_seats.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE seats (\\n    id                  BIGSERIAL     PRIMARY KEY,\\n    show_slot_id        BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    pricing_tier_id     BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    eb_ticket_class_id  VARCHAR(255)  NOT NULL,\\n    seat_number         VARCHAR(20)   NOT NULL,\\n    row_label           VARCHAR(10),\\n    section             VARCHAR(100),\\n    lock_state          VARCHAR(20)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 'AVAILABLE'\\n                         CONSTRAINT chk_seat_lock_state CHECK (lock_state IN ('AVAILABLE', 'SOFT_LOCKED', 'HARD_LOCKED', 'PAYMENT_PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'RELEASED')),\\n    locked_by_user_id   BIGINT,\\n    locked_until        TIMESTAMPTZ,\\n    eb_order_id         VARCHAR(255),\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT uq_seat_position UNIQUE (show_slot_id, seat_number)\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_seats_slot_state   ON seats(show_slot_id, lock_state);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_seats_locked_until ON seats(locked_until);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_seats_user_lock    ON seats(locked_by_user_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_seats_eb_order     ON seats(eb_order_id);\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V20__create_ga_inventory_claims.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE ga_inventory_claims (\\n    id                  BIGSERIAL     PRIMARY KEY,\\n    show_slot_id        BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    pricing_tier_id     BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    user_id             BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    cart_id             BIGINT,\\n    quantity            INTEGER       NOT NULL CHECK (quantity > 0),\\n    lock_state          VARCHAR(20)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SOFT_LOCKED'\\n                         CONSTRAINT chk_ga_lock_state CHECK (lock_state IN ('AVAILABLE', 'SOFT_LOCKED', 'HARD_LOCKED', 'PAYMENT_PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'RELEASED')),\\n    locked_until        TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL,\\n    eb_order_id         VARCHAR(255),\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT uq_ga_claim_user_tier UNIQUE (show_slot_id, pricing_tier_id, user_id, cart_id)\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_ga_claim_slot_tier ON ga_inventory_claims(show_slot_id, pricing_tier_id, lock_state);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_ga_claim_user      ON ga_inventory_claims(user_id, lock_state);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_ga_claim_expiry    ON ga_inventory_claims(locked_until, lock_state);\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V21__create_carts.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE carts (\\n    id              BIGSERIAL      PRIMARY KEY,\\n    user_id         BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    show_slot_id    BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    org_id          BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    seating_mode    VARCHAR(20)    NOT NULL\\n                     CONSTRAINT chk_cart_seating_mode CHECK (seating_mode IN ('RESERVED', 'GA')),\\n    status          VARCHAR(20)    NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING'\\n                     CONSTRAINT chk_cart_status CHECK (status IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'ABANDONED', 'EXPIRED')),\\n    expires_at      TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL,\\n    coupon_code     VARCHAR(100),\\n    discount_amount DECIMAL(12,2)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,\\n    currency        VARCHAR(3)     NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',\\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\\n);\\n\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_cart_user_slot_pending\\n    ON carts(user_id, show_slot_id)\\n    WHERE status = 'PENDING';\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_user   ON carts(user_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_slot   ON carts(show_slot_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_status ON carts(status);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_expiry ON carts(expires_at, status);\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V22__create_cart_items.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE cart_items (\\n    id                  BIGSERIAL      PRIMARY KEY,\\n    cart_id             BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    seat_id             BIGINT,\\n    ga_claim_id         BIGINT,\\n    pricing_tier_id     BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    eb_ticket_class_id  VARCHAR(255)   NOT NULL,\\n    base_price_amount   DECIMAL(12,2)  NOT NULL,\\n    currency            VARCHAR(3)     NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',\\n    quantity            INTEGER        NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (quantity > 0),\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_cart_item_cart     FOREIGN KEY (cart_id)     REFERENCES carts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_cart_item_seat     FOREIGN KEY (seat_id)     REFERENCES seats(id),\\n    CONSTRAINT fk_cart_item_ga_claim FOREIGN KEY (ga_claim_id) REFERENCES ga_inventory_claims(id),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_cart_item_mode CHECK (\\n        (seat_id IS NOT NULL AND ga_claim_id IS NULL)\\n        OR (seat_id IS NULL AND ga_claim_id IS NOT NULL)\\n    )\\n);\\n\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_cart_item_cart_seat ON cart_items(cart_id, seat_id) WHERE seat_id IS NOT NULL;\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_item_cart ON cart_items(cart_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_item_seat ON cart_items(seat_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cart_item_tier ON cart_items(pricing_tier_id);\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V23__create_group_discount_rules.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE group_discount_rules (\\n    id                        BIGSERIAL     PRIMARY KEY,\\n    show_slot_id              BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    pricing_tier_id           BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    group_discount_threshold  INTEGER       NOT NULL,\\n    group_discount_percent    DECIMAL(5,2)  NOT NULL,\\n    created_at                TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n    updated_at                TIMESTAMPTZ   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT uq_discount_rule_tier UNIQUE (show_slot_id, pricing_tier_id)\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_group_discount_slot_tier ON group_discount_rules(show_slot_id, pricing_tier_id);\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V24__create_seat_lock_audit_log.sql <<'EOF'\\n-- owner: booking-inventory module\\nCREATE TABLE seat_lock_audit_log (\\n    id              BIGSERIAL      PRIMARY KEY,\\n    seat_id         BIGINT,\\n    ga_claim_id     BIGINT,\\n    show_slot_id    BIGINT         NOT NULL,\\n    user_id         BIGINT,\\n    from_state      VARCHAR(20),\\n    to_state        VARCHAR(20)    NOT NULL,\\n    event_type      VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,\\n    reason          VARCHAR(500),\\n    eb_order_id     VARCHAR(255),\\n    occurred_at     TIMESTAMPTZ    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_audit_from_state CHECK (from_state IS NULL OR from_state IN ('AVAILABLE', 'SOFT_LOCKED', 'HARD_LOCKED', 'PAYMENT_PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'RELEASED')),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_audit_to_state   CHECK (to_state IN ('AVAILABLE', 'SOFT_LOCKED', 'HARD_LOCKED', 'PAYMENT_PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'RELEASED'))\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_audit_seat     ON seat_lock_audit_log(seat_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_audit_slot     ON seat_lock_audit_log(show_slot_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_audit_user     ON seat_lock_audit_log(user_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_audit_occurred ON seat_lock_audit_log(occurred_at);\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_76PtXtzzdan5AWX1dX4Aqn9t"
  }

AuthController {\n\n    private final AuthService authService;\n\n    public AuthController(AuthService authService) {\n        this.authService = authService;\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/register\")\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.CREATED)\n    public RegisterResponse register(@Valid @RequestBody RegisterRequest request) {\n        return authService.register(request);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/login\")\n    public AuthTokensResponse login(@Valid @RequestBody LoginRequest request) {\n        return authService.login(request);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/logout\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n    public MessageResponse logout(@Valid @RequestBody LogoutRequest request) {\n        return authService.logout(request.refreshToken());\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/me\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n    public UserProfileResponse me(Authentication authentication) {\n        return authService.me(currentUserId(authentication));\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/password/change\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n    public MessageResponse changePassword(\n        Authentication authentication,\n        @Valid @RequestBody PasswordChangeRequest request\n    ) {\n        return authService.changePassword(currentUserId(authentication), request);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/password/reset\")\n    public MessageResponse requestPasswordReset(@Valid @RequestBody PasswordResetRequest request) {\n        return authService.requestPasswordReset(request.email());\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/password/reset/confirm\")\n    public MessageResponse confirmPasswordReset(@Valid @RequestBody PasswordResetConfirmRequest request) {\n        return authService.confirmPasswordReset(request);\n    }\n\n    private Long currentUserId(Authentication authentication) {\n        return ((AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal()).userId();\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

((AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal()).userId();\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 283
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T12:41:49.365Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:41:49.365Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_nCFh3J7QGf5IPXt8svu4dx1R",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbTicketService.java\n@@\n import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;\n+import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;\n@@\n-    private record TicketClassListResponse(List<EbTicketClassResponse> ticketClasses) {}\n+    private record TicketClassListResponse(@JsonProperty(\"ticket_classes\") List<EbTicketClassResponse> ticketClasses) {}\n@@\n     public String copySeatMap(String eventId, String sourceSeatMapId) {\n@@\n     }\n+\n+    @Override\n+    public EbTicketClassResponse getTicketClass(String eventId, String ticketClassId) {\n+        try {\n+            return client.get()\n+                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/{ticketClassId}/\", eventId, ticketClassId)\n+                .retrieve()\n+                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n+                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB getTicketClass failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n+                })\n+                .body(EbTicketClassResponse.class);\n+        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n+            throw ex;\n+        } catch (Exception ex) {\n+            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB getTicketClass error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    @Override\n+    public List<EbTicketClassResponse> listTicketClasses(String eventId) {\n+        try {\n+            TicketClassListResponse response = client.get()\n+                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n+                .retrieve()\n+                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n+                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB listTicketClasses failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n+                })\n+                .body(TicketClassListResponse.class);\n+            return response == null || response.ticketClasses() == null\n+                ? List.of()\n+                : response.ticketClasses();\n+        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n+            throw ex;\n+        } catch (Exception ex) {\n+            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB listTicketClasses error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n+        }\n+    }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 312
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T12:42:43.857Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:42:43.857Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_I5OgQTyNJqj6BCyDWsAvCp0J",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/client/SchedulingSlotClient.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.IntegrationException;\n+import java.util.List;\n import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\n import org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\n+import org.springframework.core.ParameterizedTypeReference;\n import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n import org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\n import org.springframework.web.client.RestClientResponseException;\n@@\n     public SchedulingSlotResponse getSlot(Long slotId) {\n@@\n     }\n+\n+    public List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> getPricingTiers(Long slotId) {\n+        try {\n+            return restClient.get()\n+                .uri(\"/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/pricing-tiers\", slotId)\n+                .retrieve()\n+                .body(new ParameterizedTypeReference<List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse>>() {\n+                });\n+        } catch (RestClientResponseException ex) {\n+            if (ex.getStatusCode() == HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND) {\n+                throw new IntegrationException(\"Pricing tiers not found via scheduling\", \"SCHEDULING_NOT_FOUND\");\n+            }\n+            throw new IntegrationException(\"Failed to fetch pricing tiers from scheduling\", \"SCHEDULING_INTEGRATION_ERROR\");\n+        }\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**
```json
{
  "payload": {
