    "call_id": "call_I5OgQTyNJqj6BCyDWsAvCp0J",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/client/SchedulingSlotClient.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.IntegrationException;\n+import java.util.List;\n import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\n import org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\n+import org.springframework.core.ParameterizedTypeReference;\n import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n import org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\n import org.springframework.web.client.RestClientResponseException;\n@@\n     public SchedulingSlotResponse getSlot(Long slotId) {\n@@\n     }\n+\n+    public List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> getPricingTiers(Long slotId) {\n+        try {\n+            return restClient.get()\n+                .uri(\"/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/pricing-tiers\", slotId)\n+                .retrieve()\n+                .body(new ParameterizedTypeReference<List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse>>() {\n+                });\n+        } catch (RestClientResponseException ex) {\n+            if (ex.getStatusCode() == HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND) {\n+                throw new IntegrationException(\"Pricing tiers not found via scheduling\", \"SCHEDULING_NOT_FOUND\");\n+            }\n+            throw new IntegrationException(\"Failed to fetch pricing tiers from scheduling\", \"SCHEDULING_INTEGRATION_ERROR\");\n+        }\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}

com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.IntegrationException;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClientResponseException;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class CatalogSeatLayoutClient {\\n\\n    private final RestClient restClient;\\n\\n    public CatalogSeatLayoutClient(@Value(\\\"${app.internal-base-url:http://localhost:8080}\\\") String baseUrl) {\\n        this.restClient = RestClient.builder().baseUrl(baseUrl).build();\\n    }\\n\\n    public CatalogSeatLayoutResponse getSeatLayout(Long venueId) {\\n        try {\\n            return restClient.get()\\n                .uri(\\\"/api/v1/catalog/venues/{venueId}/seat-layout\\\", venueId)\\n                .retrieve()\\n                .body(CatalogSeatLayoutResponse.class);\\n        } catch (RestClientResponseException ex) {\\n            if (ex.getStatusCode() == HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND) {\\n                throw new IntegrationException(\\\"Venue seat layout not found\\\", \\\"CATALOG_NOT_FOUND\\\");\\n            }\\n            throw new IntegrationException(\\\"Failed to fetch venue seat layout\\\", \\\"CATALOG_INTEGRATION_ERROR\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/client/CatalogSeatLayoutResponse.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client;\\n\\nimport java.util.List;\\n\\npublic record CatalogSeatLayoutResponse(\\n    Long venueId,\\n    Integer totalSeats,\\n    List<CatalogSeatResponse> seats\\n) {\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/client/CatalogSeatResponse.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client;\\n\\npublic record CatalogSeatResponse(\\n    Long id,\\n    String section,\\n    String rowLabel,\\n    String seatNumber,\\n    String tierName,\\n    boolean accessible\\n) {\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

  }

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:43:25.336Z",

  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/redis/SeatLockRedisService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis;\\n\\nimport java.time.Duration;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate;\\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.script.DefaultRedisScript;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class SeatLockRedisService {\\n\\n    public enum AcquireResult { ACQUIRED, ALREADY_YOURS, CONFLICT }\\n\\n    private static final DefaultRedisScript<String> ACQUIRE_SCRIPT = new DefaultRedisScript<>(\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n            local key = KEYS[1]\\n            local owner = ARGV[1]\\n            local ttl = tonumber(ARGV[2])\\n            local current = redis.call('GET', key)\\n            if not current then\\n              redis.call('PSETEX', key, ttl, owner)\\n              return 'ACQUIRED'\\n            end\\n            if current == owner then\\n              return 'ALREADY_YOURS'\\n            end\\n            return 'CONFLICT'\\n            \\\"\\\"\\\",\\n        String.class\\n    );\\n\\n    private static final DefaultRedisScript<String> RELEASE_SCRIPT = new DefaultRedisScript<>(\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n            local key = KEYS[1]\\n            local owner = ARGV[1]\\n            local current = redis.call('GET', key)\\n            if not current then\\n              return 'EXPIRED'\\n            end\\n            if current ~= owner then\\n              return 'NOT_OWNER'\\n            end\\n            redis.call('DEL', key)\\n            return 'RELEASED'\\n            \\\"\\\"\\\",\\n        String.class\\n    );\\n\\n    private static final DefaultRedisScript<String> EXTEND_SCRIPT = new DefaultRedisScript<>(\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n            local key = KEYS[1]\\n            local owner = ARGV[1]\\n            local ttl = tonumber(ARGV[2])\\n            local current = redis.call('GET', key)\\n            if not current then\\n              return 'EXPIRED'\\n            end\\n            if current ~= owner then\\n              return 'NOT_OWNER'\\n            end\\n            redis.call('PEXPIRE', key, ttl)\\n            return 'EXTENDED'\\n            \\\"\\\"\\\",\\n        String.class\\n    );\\n\\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\\n\\n    public SeatLockRedisService(StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate) {\\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\\n    }\\n\\n    public AcquireResult acquire(Long seatId, Long userId, Duration ttl) {\\n        String key = seatKey(seatId);\\n        String result = stringRedisTemplate.execute(\\n            ACQUIRE_SCRIPT,\\n            List.of(key),\\n            String.valueOf(userId),\\n            String.valueOf(ttl.toMillis())\\n        );\\n        if (\\\"ACQUIRED\\\".equals(result)) {\\n            return AcquireResult.ACQUIRED;\\n        }\\n        if (\\\"ALREADY_YOURS\\\".equals(result)) {\\n            return AcquireResult.ALREADY_YOURS;\\n        }\\n        return AcquireResult.CONFLICT;\\n    }\\n\\n    public boolean extend(Long seatId, Long userId, Duration ttl) {\\n        String result = stringRedisTemplate.execute(\\n            EXTEND_SCRIPT,\\n            List.of(seatKey(seatId)),\\n            String.valueOf(userId),\\n            String.valueOf(ttl.toMillis())\\n        );\\n        return \\\"EXTENDED\\\".equals(result);\\n    }\\n\\n    public boolean release(Long seatId, Long userId) {\\n        String result = stringRedisTemplate.execute(\\n            RELEASE_SCRIPT,\\n            List.of(seatKey(seatId)),\\n            String.valueOf(userId)\\n        );\\n        return \\\"RELEASED\\\".equals(result) || \\\"EXPIRED\\\".equals(result);\\n    }\\n\\n    public boolean isOwnedBy(Long seatId, Long userId) {\\n        String owner = stringRedisTemplate.opsForValue().get(seatKey(seatId));\\n        return String.valueOf(userId).equals(owner);\\n    }\\n\\n    public String seatKey(Long seatId) {\\n        return \\\"seat:lock:\\\" + seatId;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/redis/GaInventoryRedisService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis;\\n\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate;\\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.script.DefaultRedisScript;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class GaInventoryRedisService {\\n\\n    private static final DefaultRedisScript<Long> CLAIM_SCRIPT = new DefaultRedisScript<>(\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n            local key = KEYS[1]\\n            local requested = tonumber(ARGV[1])\\n            local current = tonumber(redis.call('GET', key) or '-1')\\n            if current < 0 then\\n              return -2\\n            end\\n            if current < requested then\\n              return -1\\n            end\\n            return redis.call('DECRBY', key, requested)\\n            \\\"\\\"\\\",\\n        Long.class\\n    );\\n\\n    private static final DefaultRedisScript<Long> RESTORE_SCRIPT = new DefaultRedisScript<>(\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n            local key = KEYS[1]\\n            local qty = tonumber(ARGV[1])\\n            return redis.call('INCRBY', key, qty)\\n            \\\"\\\"\\\",\\n        Long.class\\n    );\\n\\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\\n\\n    public GaInventoryRedisService(StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate) {\\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\\n    }\\n\\n    public long claim(Long slotId, Long tierId, int requested) {\\n        Long result = stringRedisTemplate.execute(CLAIM_SCRIPT, List.of(key(slotId, tierId)), String.valueOf(requested));\\n        return result == null ? -2 : result;\\n    }\\n\\n    public long restore(Long slotId, Long tierId, int quantity) {\\n        Long result = stringRedisTemplate.execute(RESTORE_SCRIPT, List.of(key(slotId, tierId)), String.valueOf(quantity));\\n        return result == null ? -1 : result;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void init(Long slotId, Long tierId, int quota) {\\n        stringRedisTemplate.opsForValue().setIfAbsent(key(slotId, tierId), String.valueOf(quota));\\n    }\\n\\n    public Long getCurrent(Long slotId, Long tierId) {\\n        String value = stringRedisTemplate.opsForValue().get(key(slotId, tierId));\\n        return value == null ? null : Long.parseLong(value);\\n    }\\n\\n    private String key(Long slotId, Long tierId) {\\n        return \\\"ga:available:\\\" + slotId + \\\":\\\" + tierId;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_HzVXNQj5EK5QPqDTwfEG0mYb"
  }
}

## Entry 327
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T12:43:45.193Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:43:45.193Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/CartPricingService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Cart;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.CartItem;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.GroupDiscountRule;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.GroupDiscountRuleRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.math.RoundingMode;\\nimport java.util.HashMap;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport java.util.function.Function;\\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class CartPricingService {\\n\\n    public record CartPricingResult(\\n        Money subtotal,\\n        Money discount,\\n        Money total,\\n        Map<Long, Money> itemDiscounts\\n    ) {\\n    }\\n\\n    private final GroupDiscountRuleRepository groupDiscountRuleRepository;\\n\\n    public CartPricingService(GroupDiscountRuleRepository groupDiscountRuleRepository) {\\n        this.groupDiscountRuleRepository = groupDiscountRuleRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    public CartPricingResult recompute(Cart cart, List<CartItem> items) {\\n        if (items.isEmpty()) {\\n            Money zero = new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, cart.getDiscountAmount().currency());\\n            cart.setDiscountAmount(zero);\\n            return new CartPricingResult(zero, zero, zero, Map.of());\\n        }\\n\\n        String currency = items.getFirst().getBasePrice().currency();\\n        BigDecimal subtotalAmount = items.stream()\\n            .map(this::lineAmount)\\n            .reduce(BigDecimal.ZERO, BigDecimal::add);\\n\\n        Map<Long, List<CartItem>> byTier = items.stream().collect(Collectors.groupingBy(CartItem::getPricingTierId));\\n        Map<Long, GroupDiscountRule> rulesByTier = groupDiscountRuleRepository.findByShowSlotId(cart.getShowSlotId()).stream()\\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(GroupDiscountRule::getPricingTierId, Function.identity(), (a, b) -> a));\\n\\n        BigDecimal totalDiscount = BigDecimal.ZERO;\\n        Map<Long, Money> itemDiscounts = new HashMap<>();\\n\\n        for (Map.Entry<Long, List<CartItem>> entry : byTier.entrySet()) {\\n            Long tierId = entry.getKey();\\n            List<CartItem> tierItems = entry.getValue();\\n            GroupDiscountRule rule = rulesByTier.get(tierId);\\n            if (rule == null || rule.getGroupDiscountThreshold() == null || rule.getGroupDiscountPercent() == null) {\\n                tierItems.forEach(item -> itemDiscounts.put(item.getId(), new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, currency)));\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n\\n            int count = tierItems.stream().mapToInt(CartItem::getQuantity).sum();\\n            if (count < rule.getGroupDiscountThreshold()) {\\n                tierItems.forEach(item -> itemDiscounts.put(item.getId(), new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, currency)));\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n\\n            BigDecimal tierSubtotal = tierItems.stream().map(this::lineAmount).reduce(BigDecimal.ZERO, BigDecimal::add);\\n            BigDecimal tierDiscount = tierSubtotal\\n                .multiply(rule.getGroupDiscountPercent())\\n                .divide(new BigDecimal(\\\"100\\\"), 2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);\\n            totalDiscount = totalDiscount.add(tierDiscount);\\n\\n            for (CartItem item : tierItems) {\\n                BigDecimal ratio = tierSubtotal.signum() == 0\\n                    ? BigDecimal.ZERO\\n                    : lineAmount(item).divide(tierSubtotal, 8, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);\\n                BigDecimal itemDiscount = tierDiscount.multiply(ratio).setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);\\n                itemDiscounts.put(item.getId(), new Money(itemDiscount, currency));\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        Money subtotal = new Money(subtotalAmount.setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP), currency);\\n        Money discount = new Money(totalDiscount.setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP), currency);\\n        Money total = new Money(subtotal.amount().subtract(discount.amount()).setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP), currency);\\n        cart.setDiscountAmount(discount);\\n\\n        return new CartPricingResult(subtotal, discount, total, itemDiscounts);\\n    }\\n\\n    private BigDecimal lineAmount(CartItem item) {\\n        return item.getBasePrice().amount().multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(item.getQuantity()));\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_QRHU6Y7AAWjeaCdy48Vu4i1o"
  }
}
```

}\\n\\n            BigDecimal tierSubtotal = tierItems.stream().map(this::lineAmount).reduce(BigDecimal.ZERO, BigDecimal::add);\\n            BigDecimal tierDiscount = tierSubtotal\\n ## Entry 332
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T12:43:53.381Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:43:53.381Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/ConflictResolutionService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.SeatAlternativesResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.SeatSuggestionResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Seat;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatRepository;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ConflictResolutionService {\\n\\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\\n\\n    public ConflictResolutionService(SeatRepository seatRepository) {\\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    public SeatAlternativesResponse alternativesFor(Seat requested) {\\n        List<SeatSuggestionResponse> sameSection = seatRepository\\n            .findAlternativesSameSection(requested.getShowSlotId(), requested.getSection(), requested.getPricingTierId())\\n            .stream()\\n            .limit(5)\\n            .map(this::toSuggestion)\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        List<SeatSuggestionResponse> adjacent = seatRepository\\n            .findAlternativesAdjacentSection(requested.getShowSlotId(), requested.getSection(), requested.getPricingTierId())\\n            .stream()\\n            .limit(3)\\n            .map(this::toSuggestion)\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        return new SeatAlternativesResponse(requested.getId(), sameSection, adjacent);\\n    }\\n\\n    private SeatSuggestionResponse toSuggestion(Seat seat) {\\n        return new SeatSuggestionResponse(seat.getId(), seat.getSeatNumber(), seat.getSection(), seat.getPricingTierId());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_SA1PKmAtWdoCaPwbTd77C0Xx"
  }
}
```

## Entry 337
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T12:44:09.541Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:44:09.541Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/mapper/SeatMapper.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.mapper;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.AvailableSeatResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Seat;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport org.mapstruct.Mapper;\\n\\n@Mapper(componentModel = \\\"spring\\\")\\npublic interface SeatMapper {\\n\\n    default AvailableSeatResponse toAvailableSeatResponse(Seat seat, String tierName, BigDecimal amount, String currency) {\\n        return new AvailableSeatResponse(\\n            seat.getId(),\\n            seat.getSeatNumber(),\\n            seat.getRowLabel(),\\n            seat.getSection(),\\n            seat.getPricingTierId(),\\n            tierName,\\n            new Money(amount, currency),\\n            seat.getLockState()\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/mapper/CartMapper.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.mapper;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.CartItemResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.CartResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Cart;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.CartItem;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.CartPricingService.CartPricingResult;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport org.mapstruct.Mapper;\\n\\n@Mapper(componentModel = \\\"spring\\\")\\npublic interface CartMapper {\\n\\n    default CartResponse toResponse(\\n        Cart cart,\\n        List<CartItem> items,\\n        CartPricingResult pricing,\\n        Map<Long, String> tierNames,\\n        Map<Long, String> seatNumbers\\n    ) {\\n        List<CartItemResponse> responses = items.stream()\\n            .map(item -> new CartItemResponse(\\n                item.getId(),\\n                item.getSeatId(),\\n                seatNumbers.get(item.getSeatId()),\\n                item.getPricingTierId(),\\n                tierNames.get(item.getPricingTierId()),\\n                item.getQuantity(),\\n                item.getBasePrice(),\\n                pricing.itemDiscounts().getOrDefault(item.getId(), new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, item.getBasePrice().currency()))\\n            ))\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        return new CartResponse(\\n            cart.getId(),\\n            cart.getShowSlotId(),\\n            cart.getStatus(),\\n            cart.getExpiresAt(),\\n            cart.getSeatingMode(),\\n            responses,\\n            pricing.subtotal(),\\n            pricing.discount(),\\n            pricing.total()\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_QEMnaUVtm7hnQRSAhq5pMyAZ"
  }
}

com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.AvailableSeatResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Seat;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport org.mapstruct.Mapper;\\n\\n@Mapper(componentModel = \\\"spring\\\")\\npublic interface SeatMapper {\\n\\n    default AvailableSeatResponse toAvailableSeatResponse(Seat seat, String tierName, BigDecimal amount, String currency) {\\n        return new AvailableSeatResponse(\\n            seat.getId(),\\n            seat.getSeatNumber(),\\n            seat.getRowLabel(),\\n            seat.getSection(),\\n            seat.getPricingTierId(),\\n            tierName,\\n            new Money(amount, currency),\\n            seat.getLockState()\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/mapper/CartMapper.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.mapper;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.CartItemResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.CartResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Cart;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.CartItem;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.CartPricingService.CartPricingResult;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport org.mapstruct.Mapper;\\n\\n@Mapper(componentModel = \\\"spring\\\")\\npublic interface CartMapper {\\n\\n    default CartResponse toResponse(\\n        Cart cart,\\n        List<CartItem> items,\\n        CartPricingResult pricing,\\n        Map<Long, String> tierNames,\\n        Map<Long, String> seatNumbers\\n    ) {\\n        List<CartItemResponse> responses = items.stream()\\n            .map(item -> new CartItemResponse(\\n                item.getId(),\\n                item.getSeatId(),\\n                seatNumbers.get(item.getSeatId()),\\n                item.getPricingTierId(),\\n                tierNames.get(item.getPricingTierId()),\\n                item.getQuantity(),\\n                item.getBasePrice(),\\n                pricing.itemDiscounts().getOrDefault(item.getId(), new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, item.getBasePrice().currency()))\\n            ))\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        return new CartResponse(\\n            cart.getId(),\\n            cart.getShowSlotId(),\\n            cart.getStatus(),\\n            cart.getExpiresAt(),\\n            cart.getSeatingMode(),\\n            responses,\\n            pricing.subtotal(),\\n            pricing.discount(),\\n            pricing.total()\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_QEMnaUVtm7hnQRSAhq5pMyAZ"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:44:23.689Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/SlotValidationService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingSlotClient;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingSlotResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BaseException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class SlotValidationService {\\n\\n    private final SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient;\\n\\n    public SlotValidationService(SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient) {\\n        this.schedulingSlotClient = schedulingSlotClient;\\n    }\\n\\n    public SchedulingSlotResponse requireActiveAndSynced(Long slotId) {\\n        SchedulingSlotResponse slot = schedulingSlotClient.getSlot(slotId);\\n        if (slot.ebEventId() == null || slot.ebEventId().isBlank()) {\\n            throw new BaseException(\\\"Eventbrite event id is missing for slot\\\", \\\"EB_EVENT_NOT_SYNCED\\\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\\n                Map.of(\\\"slotId\\\", slotId)) {\\n            };\\n        }\\n        if (!\\\"ACTIVE\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(slot.status())) {\\n            throw new BaseException(\\\"Slot is not active\\\", \\\"SLOT_NOT_ACTIVE\\\", HttpStatus.CONFLICT, Map.of(\\\"currentStatus\\\", slot.status())) {\\n            };\\n        }\\n        return slot;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void ensureTierSynced(Long tierId, String ebTicketClassId) {\\n        if (ebTicketClassId == null || ebTicketClassId.isBlank()) {\\n            throw new BaseException(\\\"Tier not synced to Eventbrite\\\", \\\"TIER_NOT_SYNCED\\\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\\n                Map.of(\\\"tierId\\\", tierId)) {\\n            };\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    public void ensureUserActive(String role) {\\n        if (role == null || role.isBlank()) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"User context missing\\\", \\\"USER_CONTEXT_MISSING\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_bFWe8YK0bYSzIUvBaYbsut0T"
  }
}

## Entry 347
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T12:44:42.122Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:44:42.122Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/SeatAvailabilityService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.AvailableSeatResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.GaTierAvailabilityResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockState;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.mapper.SeatMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.GaInventoryClaimRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingPricingTierResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingSlotClient;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingSlotResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis.GaInventoryRedisService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport java.util.function.Function;\\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class SeatAvailabilityService {\\n\\n    private final SlotValidationService slotValidationService;\\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\\n    private final SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient;\\n    private final SeatMapper seatMapper;\\n    private final GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService;\\n    private final GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository;\\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\\n\\n    public SeatAvailabilityService(\\n        SlotValidationService slotValidationService,\\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\\n        SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient,\\n        SeatMapper seatMapper,\\n        GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService,\\n        GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository,\\n        StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate\\n    ) {\\n        this.slotValidationService = slotValidationService;\\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\\n        this.schedulingSlotClient = schedulingSlotClient;\\n        this.seatMapper = seatMapper;\\n        this.gaInventoryRedisService = gaInventoryRedisService;\\n        this.gaInventoryClaimRepository = gaInventoryClaimRepository;\\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\\n    }\\n\\n    public AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse getAvailability(Long slotId) {\\n        SchedulingSlotResponse slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(slotId);\\n        List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tiers = schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(slotId);\\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierMap = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\\n\\n        if (slot.seatingMode() == SeatingMode.RESERVED) {\\n            List<AvailableSeatResponse> seats = seatRepository.findAvailableForSlot(slotId, java.time.Instant.now())\\n                .stream()\\n                .map(seat -> {\\n                    SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier = tierMap.get(seat.getPricingTierId());\\n                    String tierName = tier == null ? null : tier.name();\\n                    BigDecimal amount = tier == null ? BigDecimal.ZERO : tier.priceAmount();\\n                    String currency = tier == null ? \\\"INR\\\" : tier.currency();\\n                    return seatMapper.toAvailableSeatResponse(seat, tierName, amount, currency);\\n                })\\n                .toList();\\n            return new AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse(slotId, slot.seatingMode(), seats, List.of());\\n        }\\n\\n        List<GaTierAvailabilityResponse> gaTiers = tiers.stream()\\n            .map(tier -> {\\n                Long available = gaInventoryRedisService.getCurrent(slotId, tier.id());\\n                if (available == null) {\\n                    long confirmed = gaInventoryClaimRepository.countByShowSlotIdAndPricingTierIdAndLockState(slotId, tier.id(), SeatLockState.CONFIRMED);\\n                    available = Math.max(0, tier.quota() - confirmed);\\n                }\\n                boolean blocked = Boolean.TRUE.equals(stringRedisTemplate.hasKey(\\\"tier:blocked:\\\" + slotId + \\\":\\\" + tier.id()));\\n                return new GaTierAvailabilityResponse(\\n                    tier.id(),\\n                    tier.name(),\\n                    tier.quota(),\\n                    available,\\n                    new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\\n                    blocked\\n                );\\n            })\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        return new AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse(slotId, slot.seatingMode(), List.of(), gaTiers);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_04tke9iOaStWN0Fu7WAnV0Gk"
  }
}
```

{\\n            List<AvailableSeatResponse> seats = seatRepository.findAvailableForSlot(slotId, java.time.Instant.now())\\n                .stream()\\n                .map(seat -> {\\n seatLockAuditLogRepository,\\n        SlotValidationService slotValidationService,\\n        SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient,\\n        SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService,\\n    EbTicketService ebTicketService,\\n        EbTokenStore ebTokenStore,\\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher,\\n        StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate\\n    ) {\\n        this.cartRepository = cartRepository;\\n        this.cartItemRepository = cartItemRepository;\\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\\n        this.gaInventoryClaimRepository = gaInventoryClaimRepository;\\n        this.seatLockAuditLogRepository = seatLockAuditLogRepository;\\n        this.slotValidationService = slotValidationService;\\n        this.schedulingSlotClient = schedulingSlotClient;\\n        this.seatLockRedisService = seatLockRedisService;\\n        this.gaInventoryRedisService = gaInventoryRedisService;\\n        this.cartPricingService = cartPricingService;\\n        this.conflictResolutionService = conflictResolutionService;\\n        this.cartMapper = cartMapper;\\n        this.ebTicketService = ebTicketService;\\n        this.ebTokenStore = ebTokenStore;\\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public CartResponse addSeat(Long userId, Long orgId, String role, AddSeatRequest request) {\\n        slotValidationService.ensureUserActive(role);\\n        SchedulingSlotResponse slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(request.slotId());\\n        List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tiers = schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(request.slotId());\\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\\n\\n        SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier = tierById.get(request.tierId());\\n        if (tier == null) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Pricing tier not found for slot\\\", \\\"TIER_NOT_FOUND\\\");\\n        }\\n        slotValidationService.ensureTierSynced(request.tierId(), tier.ebTicketClassId());\\n        assertOrgConnected(orgId);\\n\\n        Cart cart = getOrCreatePendingCart(userId, slot, orgId, tier.currency());\\n\\n        if (slot.seatingMode() == com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode.RESERVED) {\\n            if (request.seatId() == null) {\\n                throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"seatId is required for RESERVED mode\\\", \\\"SEAT_ID_REQUIRED\\\");\\n            }\\n            addReservedSeat(userId, cart, tierById, request, tier);\\n        } else {\\n            addGaTier(userId, cart, request, tier);\\n        }\\n\\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public CartResponse removeItem(Long userId, Long itemId) {\\n        CartItem item = cartItemRepository.findByIdAndCartUserId(itemId, userId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CartItemNotFoundException(itemId));\\n\\n        Cart cart = item.getCart();\\n        if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\\n            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId())\\n                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Seat not found\\\", \\\"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n            if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED\\n                || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.PAYMENT_PENDING\\n                || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\\n                throw new BaseException(\\\"Seat removal not allowed\\\", \\\"SEAT_REMOVAL_NOT_ALLOWED\\\", HttpStatus.CONFLICT,\\n                    Map.of(\\\"lockState\\\", seat.getLockState().name())) {\\n                };\\n            }\\n            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\\n            seat.release(LockReleaseReason.USER_REMOVED);\\n            seatRepository.save(seat);\\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\\n            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.USER_REMOVED.name(), null);\\n        } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\\n            gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\\n                gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\\n            });\\n        }\\n\\n        cart.removeItem(item);\\n        cartItemRepository.delete(item);\\n\\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById = fetchTierMap(cart.getShowSlotId());\\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public CartResponse getCart(Long userId, Long cartId) {\\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(cartId);\\n        }\\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, fetchTierMap(cart.getShowSlotId()));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public CartResponse confirm(Long userId, Long orgId, ConfirmCartRequest request) {\\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(request.cartId()).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId()));\\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId());\\n        }\\n        cart.ensurePending();\\n        if (cart.isExpired(Instant.now())) {\\n            throw new CartExpiredException(cart.getId(), cart.getExpiresAt());\\n        }\\n\\n        List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tiers = schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(cart.getShowSlotId());\\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\\n        SchedulingSlotResponse slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(cart.getShowSlotId());\\n\\n        Set<Long> expiredSeatIds = cart.getItems().stream()\\n            .map(CartItem::getSeatId)\\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\\n            .filter(seatId -> !seatLockRedisService.isOwnedBy(seatId, userId))\\n            .collect(Collectors.toSet());\\n        if (!expiredSeatIds.isEmpty()) {\\n            throw new SoftLockExpiredException(expiredSeatIds);\\n        }\\n\\n        Map<String, Long> ticketClassToTier = tierById.values().stream()\\n            .filter(t -> t.ebTicketClassId() != null)\\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::ebTicketClassId, SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, (a, b) -> a));\\n\\n        for (String ticketClassId : cart.getItems().stream().map(CartItem::getEbTicketClassId).collect(Collectors.toSet())) {\\n            EbTicketClassResponse ticketClass;\\n            try {\\n                ticketClass = ebTicketService.getTicketClass(slot.ebEventId(), ticketClassId);\\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n                throw new BaseException(\\\"Eventbrite unavailable\\\", \\\"EB_UNAVAILABLE\\\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\\n                    Map.of(\\\"retryAfterSeconds\\\", 10)) {\\n                };\\n            }\\n            if (ticketClass != null && \\\"SOLD_OUT\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(ticketClass.onSaleStatus())) {\\n                Long soldOutTierId = ticketClassToTier.get(ticketClassId);\\n                releaseTierLocks(cart, userId, soldOutTierId);\\n                List<Map<String, Object>> alternativeTiers = tierById.values().stream()\\n                    .filter(t -> !Objects.equals(t.id(), soldOutTierId))\\n                    .map(t -> Map.<String, Object>of(\\\"tierId\\\", t.id(), \\\"tierName\\\", t.name()))\\n                    .toList();\\n                throw new TierSoldOutException(soldOutTierId, Map.of(\\\"otherTiers\\\", alternativeTiers));\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        for (CartItem item : cart.getItems()) {\\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId())\\n                    .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Seat not found\\\", \\\"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n                try {\\n                    if (!seatLockRedisService.extend(seat.getId(), userId, HARD_LOCK_TTL)) {\\n                        throw new HardLockException(\\\"Failed to extend Redis lock for seat=\\\" + seat.getId());\\n                    }\\n                    SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\\n                    seat.hardLock(HARD_LOCK_TTL);\\n                    seatRepository.save(seat);\\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM, null, null);\\n                } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\\n                    throw ex;\\n                }\\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\\n                    claim.hardLock(Instant.now().plus(HARD_LOCK_TTL));\\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.save(claim);\\n                });\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        cart.extendTtl(HARD_LOCK_TTL);\\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\\n\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CartAssembledEvent(\\n            cart.getId(),\\n            cart.getShowSlotId(),\\n            cart.getUserId(),\\n            cart.getOrgId(),\\n            slot.ebEventId(),\\n            cart.getCouponCode()\\n        ));\\n\\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void abandon(Long userId, AbandonCartRequest request) {\\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(request.cartId()).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId()));\\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId());\\n        }\\n\\n        for (CartItem item : new ArrayList<>(cart.getItems())) {\\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId()).orElse(null);\\n                if (seat != null && seat.getLockState() != SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\\n                    SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\\n                    seat.release(LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED);\\n                    seatRepository.save(seat);\\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED.name(), null);\\n                }\\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\\n                    gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\\n                });\\n            }\\n            cart.removeItem(item);\\n            cartItemRepository.delete(item);\\n        }\\n\\n        cart.abandon();\\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void handlePaymentTimeout(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, Long userId) {\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new PaymentTimeoutEvent(cartId, seatIds, userId));\\n    }\\n\\n    private Cart getOrCreatePendingCart(Long userId, SchedulingSlotResponse slot, Long orgId, String currency) {\\n        return cartRepository.findByUserIdAndShowSlotIdAndStatus(userId, slot.id(), CartStatus.PENDING)\\n            .orElseGet(() -> {\\n                try {\\n                    Cart created = new Cart(userId, slot.id(), orgId, slot.seatingMode(), SOFT_LOCK_TTL, currency);\\n                    return cartRepository.save(created);\\n                } catch (DataIntegrityViolationException ex) {\\n                    return cartRepository.findByUserIdAndShowSlotIdAndStatus(userId, slot.id(), CartStatus.PENDING)\\n                        .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Pending cart already exists\\\", \\\"CART_ALREADY_EXISTS\\\"));\\n                }\\n            });\\n    }\\n\\n    private void addReservedSeat(\\n        Long userId,\\n        Cart cart,\\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById,\\n        AddSeatRequest request,\\n        SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier\\n    ) {\\n        Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(request.seatId())\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Seat not found\\\", \\\"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n\\n        if (!Objects.equals(seat.getShowSlotId(), request.slotId()) || !Objects.equals(seat.getPricingTierId(), request.tierId())) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Seat does not belong to slot/tier\\\", \\\"SEAT_MISMATCH\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        AcquireResult result = seatLockRedisService.acquire(seat.getId(), userId, SOFT_LOCK_TTL);\\n        if (result == AcquireResult.CONFLICT) {\\n            throw new SeatUnavailableException(seat.getId(), conflictResolutionService.alternativesFor(seat));\\n        }\\n\\n        if (result == AcquireResult.ACQUIRED && !seat.isSelectable(Instant.now())) {\\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\\n            throw new SeatUnavailableException(seat.getId(), conflictResolutionService.alternativesFor(seat));\\n        }\\n\\n        try {\\n            if (result == AcquireResult.ACQUIRED) {\\n                SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\\n                seat.softLock(userId, SOFT_LOCK_TTL);\\n                seatRepository.save(seat);\\n                writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.SELECT, null, null);\\n            }\\n\\n            if (!cartItemRepository.existsByCartIdAndSeatId(cart.getId(), seat.getId())) {\\n                CartItem item = new CartItem(\\n                    seat.getId(),\\n                    null,\\n                    seat.getPricingTierId(),\\n                    seat.getEbTicketClassId(),\\n                    new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\\n                    1\\n                );\\n                cart.addItem(item);\\n                cartItemRepository.save(item);\\n            }\\n        } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\\n            throw new SeatLockException(\\\"DB failure while soft-locking seat=\\\" + seat.getId());\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private void addGaTier(Long userId, Cart cart, AddSeatRequest request, SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier) {\\n        String blocked = stringRedisTemplate.opsForValue().get(\\\"tier:blocked:\\\" + request.slotId() + \\\":\\\" + request.tierId());\\n        if (blocked != null) {\\n            throw new TierBlockedException(request.tierId());\\n        }\\n\\n        long claimResult = gaInventoryRedisService.claim(request.slotId(), request.tierId(), request.quantity());\\n        if (claimResult == -2) {\\n            throw new BaseException(\\\"GA counter not initialized\\\", \\\"GA_COUNTER_NOT_INITIALIZED\\\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE) {\\n            };\\n        }\\n        if (claimResult < 0) {\\n            throw new BaseException(\\n                \\\"Insufficient GA inventory\\\",\\n                \\\"INSUFFICIENT_GA_INVENTORY\\\",\\n                HttpStatus.CONFLICT,\\n                Map.of(\\\"tierId\\\", request.tierId(), \\\"requested\\\", request.quantity(), \\\"available\\\", 0)\\n            ) {\\n            };\\n        }\\n\\n        GaInventoryClaim claim = new GaInventoryClaim(\\n            request.slotId(),\\n            request.tierId(),\\n            userId,\\n            cart.getId(),\\n            request.quantity(),\\n            Instant.now().plus(SOFT_LOCK_TTL)\\n        );\\n        claim = gaInventoryClaimRepository.save(claim);\\n\\n        CartItem item = new CartItem(\\n            null,\\n            claim.getId(),\\n            request.tierId(),\\n            tier.ebTicketClassId(),\\n            new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\\n            request.quantity()\\n        );\\n        cart.addItem(item);\\n        cartItemRepository.save(item);\\n    }\\n\\n    private Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> fetchTierMap(Long slotId) {\\n        return schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(slotId).stream()\\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\\n    }\\n\\n    private CartResponse buildCartResponse(Cart cart, Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById) {\\n        List<CartItem> items = cartItemRepository.findByCartId(cart.getId());\\n        CartPricingResult pricing = cartPricingService.recompute(cart, items);\\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\\n\\n        Map<Long, String> tierNames = tierById.values().stream()\\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, SchedulingPricingTierResponse::name, (a, b) -> a));\\n\\n        Map<Long, String> seatNumbers = new HashMap<>();\\n        List<Long> seatIds = items.stream().map(CartItem::getSeatId).filter(Objects::nonNull).toList();\\n        if (!seatIds.isEmpty()) {\\n            seatRepository.findAllById(seatIds).forEach(seat -> seatNumbers.put(seat.getId(), seat.getSeatNumber()));\\n        }\\n\\n        return cartMapper.toResponse(cart, items, pricing, tierNames, seatNumbers);\\n    }\\n\\n    private void writeAudit(\\n        Seat seat,\\n        Long userId,\\n        SeatLockState from,\\n        SeatLockState to,\\n        SeatLockEvent event,\\n        String reason,\\n        String orderId\\n    ) {\\n        seatLockAuditLogRepository.save(new SeatLockAuditLog(\\n            seat.getId(),\\n            null,\\n            seat.getShowSlotId(),\\n            userId,\\n            from,\\n            to,\\n            event,\\n            reason,\\n            orderId\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    private void assertOrgConnected(Long orgId) {\\n        try {\\n            ebTokenStore.getValidToken(orgId);\\n        } catch (EbAuthException ex) {\\n            throw new BaseException(\\\"Organization is not connected to Eventbrite\\\", \\\"ORG_NOT_CONNECTED\\\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE) {\\n            };\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private void releaseTierLocks(Cart cart, Long userId, Long soldOutTierId) {\\n        for (CartItem item : cart.getItems()) {\\n            if (!Objects.equals(item.getPricingTierId(), soldOutTierId)) {\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\\n                seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId()).ifPresent(seat -> {\\n                    if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED) {\\n                        SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\\n                        seat.release(LockReleaseReason.TIER_SOLD_OUT);\\n                        seatRepository.save(seat);\\n                        seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\\n                        writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.TIER_SOLD_OUT.name(), null);\\n                    }\\n                });\\n            }\\n            if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\\n                    gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\\n                });\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

Map.of(\\\"otherTiers\\\", alternativeTiers));\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        for (CartItem item : cart.getItems()) {\\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId())\\n                    .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Seat not found\\\", \\\"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n                try {\\n                    if (!seatLockRedisService.extend(seat.getId(), userId, HARD_LOCK_TTL)) {\\n                        throw new HardLockException(\\\"Failed to extend Redis lock for seat=\\\" + seat.getId());\\n                    }\\n                    SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\\n                    seat.hardLock(HARD_LOCK_TTL);\\n                    seatRepository.save(seat);\\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM, null, null);\\n                } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\\n                    throw ex;\\n                }\\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\\n                    claim.hardLock(Instant.now().plus(HARD_LOCK_TTL));\\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.save(claim);\\n                });\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        cart.extendTtl(HARD_LOCK_TTL);\\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\\n\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CartAssembledEvent(\\n            cart.getId(),\\n            cart.getShowSlotId(),\\n            cart.getUserId(),\\n            cart.getOrgId(),\\n            slot.ebEventId(),\\n            cart.getCouponCode()\\n        ));\\n\\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void abandon(Long userId, AbandonCartRequest request) {\\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(request.cartId()).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId()));\\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId());\\n        }\\n\\n        for (CartItem item : new ArrayList<>(cart.getItems())) {\\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId()).orElse(null);\\n                if (seat != null && seat.getLockState() != SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\\n                    SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\\n                    seat.release(LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED);\\n                    seatRepository.save(seat);\\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED.name(), null);\\n                }\\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\\n                    gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\\n                });\\n            }\\n            cart.removeItem(item);\\n            cartItemRepository.delete(item);\\n        }\\n\\n        cart.abandon();\\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void handlePaymentTimeout(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, Long userId) {\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new PaymentTimeoutEvent(cartId, seatIds, userId));\\n    }\\n\\n    private Cart getOrCreatePendingCart(Long userId, SchedulingSlotResponse slot, Long orgId, String currency) {\\n        return cartRepository.findByUserIdAndShowSlotIdAndStatus(userId, slot.id(), CartStatus.PENDING)\\n            .orElseGet(() -> {\\n                try {\\n                    Cart created = new Cart(userId, slot.id(), orgId, slot.seatingMode(), SOFT_LOCK_TTL, currency);\\n                    return cartRepository.save(created);\\n                } catch (DataIntegrityViolationException ex) {\\n                    return cartRepository.findByUserIdAndShowSlotIdAndStatus(userId, slot.id(), CartStatus.PENDING)\\n                        .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Pending cart already exists\\\", \\\"CART_ALREADY_EXISTS\\\"));\\n                }\\n            });\\n    }\\n\\n    private void addReservedSeat(\\n        Long userId,\\n        Cart cart,\\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById,\\n        AddSeatRequest request,\\n        SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier\\n    ) {\\n        Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(request.seatId())\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Seat not found\\\", \\\"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n\\n        if (!Objects.equals(seat.getShowSlotId(), request.slotId()) || !Objects.equals(seat.getPricingTierId(), request.tierId())) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Seat does not belong to slot/tier\\\", \\\"SEAT_MISMATCH\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        AcquireResult result = seatLockRedisService.acquire(seat.getId(), userId, SOFT_LOCK_TTL);\\n        if (result == AcquireResult.CONFLICT) {\\n            throw new SeatUnavailableException(seat.getId(), conflictResolutionService.alternativesFor(seat));\\n        }\\n\\n        if (result == AcquireResult.ACQUIRED && !seat.isSelectable(Instant.now())) {\\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\\n            throw new SeatUnavailableException(seat.getId(), conflictResolutionService.alternativesFor(seat));\\n        }\\n\\n        try {\\n            if (result == AcquireResult.ACQUIRED) {\\n                SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\\n                seat.softLock(userId, SOFT_LOCK_TTL);\\n                seatRepository.save(seat);\\n                writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.SELECT, null, null);\\n            }\\n\\n            if (!cartItemRepository.existsByCartIdAndSeatId(cart.getId(), seat.getId())) {\\n                CartItem item = new CartItem(\\n                    seat.getId(),\\n                    null,\\n                    seat.getPricingTierId(),\\n                    seat.getEbTicketClassId(),\\n                    new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\\n                    1\\n                );\\n                cart.addItem(item);\\n                cartItemRepository.save(item);\\n            }\\n        } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\\n            throw new SeatLockException(\\\"DB failure while soft-locking seat=\\\" + seat.getId());\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private void addGaTier(Long userId, Cart cart, AddSeatRequest request, SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier) {\\n        String blocked = stringRedisTemplate.opsForValue().get(\\\"tier:blocked:\\\" + request.slotId() + \\\":\\\" + request.tierId());\\n        if (blocked != null) {\\n            throw new TierBlockedException(request.tierId());\\n        }\\n\\n        long claimResult = gaInventoryRedisService.claim(request.slotId(), request.tierId(), request.quantity());\\n        if (claimResult == -2) {\\n            throw new BaseException(\\\"GA counter not initialized\\\", \\\"GA_COUNTER_NOT_INITIALIZED\\\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE) {\\n            };\\n        }\\n        if (claimResult < 0) {\\n            throw new BaseException(\\n                \\\"Insufficient GA inventory\\\",\\n                \\\"INSUFFICIENT_GA_INVENTORY\\\",\\n                HttpStatus.CONFLICT,\\n                Map.of(\\\"tierId\\\", request.tierId(), \\\"requested\\\", request.quantity(), \\\"available\\\", 0)\\n            ) {\\n            };\\n        }\\n\\n        GaInventoryClaim claim = new GaInventoryClaim(\\n            request.slotId(),\\n            request.tierId(),\\n            userId,\\n            cart.getId(),\\n            request.quantity(),\\n            Instant.now().plus(SOFT_LOCK_TTL)\\n        );\\n        claim = gaInventoryClaimRepository.save(claim);\\n\\n        CartItem item = new CartItem(\\n            null,\\n            claim.getId(),\\n            request.tierId(),\\n            tier.ebTicketClassId(),\\n            new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\\n            request.quantity()\\n        );\\n        cart.addItem(item);\\n        cartItemRepository.save(item);\\n    }\\n\\n    private Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> fetchTierMap(Long slotId) {\\n        return schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(slotId).stream()\\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\\n    }\\n\\n    private CartResponse buildCartResponse(Cart cart, Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById) {\\n        List<CartItem> items = cartItemRepository.findByCartId(cart.getId());\\n        CartPricingResult pricing = cartPricingService.recompute(cart, items);\\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\\n\\n        Map<Long, String> tierNames = tierById.values().stream()\\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, SchedulingPricingTierResponse::name, (a, b) -> a));\\n\\n        Map<Long, String> seatNumbers = new HashMap<>();\\n        List<Long> seatIds = items.stream().map(CartItem::getSeatId).filter(Objects::nonNull).toList();\\n        if (!seatIds.isEmpty()) {\\n            seatRepository.findAllById(seatIds).forEach(seat -> seatNumbers.put(seat.getId(), seat.getSeatNumber()));\\n        }\\n\\n        return cartMapper.toResponse(cart, items, pricing, tierNames, seatNumbers);\\n    }\\n\\n    private void writeAudit(\\n        Seat seat,\\n        Long userId,\\n        SeatLockState from,\\n        SeatLockState to,\\n        SeatLockEvent event,\\n        String reason,\\n        String orderId\\n    ) {\\n        seatLockAuditLogRepository.save(new SeatLockAuditLog(\\n            seat.getId(),\\n            null,\\n            seat.getShowSlotId(),\\n            userId,\\n            from,\\n            to,\\n            event,\\n            reason,\\n            orderId\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    private void assertOrgConnected(Long orgId) {\\n        try {\\n            ebTokenStore.getValidToken(orgId);\\n        } catch (EbAuthException ex) {\\n            throw new BaseException(\\\"Organization is not connected to Eventbrite\\\", \\\"ORG_NOT_CONNECTED\\\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE) {\\n            };\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private void releaseTierLocks(Cart cart, Long userId, Long soldOutTierId) {\\n        for (CartItem item : cart.getItems()) {\\n            if (!Objects.equals(item.getPricingTierId(), soldOutTierId)) {\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\\n                seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId()).ifPresent(seat -> {\\n                    if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED) {\\n                        SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\\n                        seat.release(LockReleaseReason.TIER_SOLD_OUT);\\n                        seatRepository.save(seat);\\n                        seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\\n                        writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.TIER_SOLD_OUT.name(), null);\\n                    }\\n                });\\n            }\\n            if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\\n                    gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\\n                });\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_3o2BDsDnz5UtBSXhppQb4iVj"
  }
}
```

## Entry 357
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T12:46:24.850Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:46:24.850Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/api/controller/SeatAvailabilityController.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.controller;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.SeatAvailabilityService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.Roles;\\nimport org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\\n\\n@RestController\\n@RequestMapping(\\\"/api/v1/booking/shows\\\")\\npublic class SeatAvailabilityController {\\n\\n    private final SeatAvailabilityService seatAvailabilityService;\\n\\n    public SeatAvailabilityController(SeatAvailabilityService seatAvailabilityService) {\\n        this.seatAvailabilityService = seatAvailabilityService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/{slotId}/available-seats\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.USER + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse getAvailableSeats(@PathVariable Long slotId) {\\n        return seatAvailabilityService.getAvailability(slotId);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/api/controller/CartController.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.controller;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.request.AbandonCartRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.request.AddSeatRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.request.ConfirmCartRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.CartResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.CatalogSeatLayoutClient;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.CatalogSeatResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingPricingTierResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingSlotClient;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Locale;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport java.util.function.Function;\\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class SeatProvisioningService {\\n\\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\\n    private final GroupDiscountRuleRepository groupDiscountRuleRepository;\\n    private final SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient;\\n    private final CatalogSeatLayoutClient catalogSeatLayoutClient;\\n    private final GaInventoryService gaInventoryService;\\n\\n    public SeatProvisioningService(\\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\\n        GroupDiscountRuleRepository groupDiscountRuleRepository,\\n        SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient,\\n        CatalogSeatLayoutClient catalogSeatLayoutClient,\\n        GaInventoryService gaInventoryService\\n    ) {\\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\\n        this.groupDiscountRuleRepository = groupDiscountRuleRepository;\\n        this.schedulingSlotClient = schedulingSlotClient;\\n        this.catalogSeatLayoutClient = catalogSeatLayoutClient;\\n        this.gaInventoryService = gaInventoryService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void provision(Long slotId, Long venueId, SeatingMode seatingMode) {\\n        List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tiers = schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(slotId);\\n        provisionGroupDiscountRules(slotId, tiers);\\n\\n        if (seatingMode == SeatingMode.GA) {\\n            gaInventoryService.initCounters(slotId, tiers);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (seatRepository.existsByShowSlotId(slotId)) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        Map<String, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierByName = tiers.stream()\\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(t -> normalize(t.name()), Function.identity(), (a, b) -> a));\\n\\n        List<CatalogSeatResponse> venueSeats = catalogSeatLayoutClient.getSeatLayout(venueId).seats();\\n        List<Seat> seats = venueSeats.stream()\\n            .map(venueSeat -> {\\n                SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier = tierByName.get(normalize(venueSeat.tierName()));\\n                if (tier == null) {\\n                    return null;\\n                }\\n                return new Seat(\\n                    slotId,\\n                    tier.id(),\\n                    tier.ebTicketClassId(),\\n                    venueSeat.seatNumber(),\\n                    venueSeat.rowLabel(),\\n                    venueSeat.section()\\n                );\\n            })\\n            .filter(java.util.Objects::nonNull)\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        seatRepository.saveAll(seats);\\n    }\\n\\n    private void provisionGroupDiscountRules(Long slotId, List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tiers) {\\n        if (!groupDiscountRuleRepository.findByShowSlotId(slotId).isEmpty()) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        List<GroupDiscountRule> rules = tiers.stream()\\n            .map(tier -> new GroupDiscountRule(\\n                slotId,\\n                tier.id(),\\n                tier.groupDiscountThreshold() == null ? Integer.MAX_VALUE : tier.groupDiscountThreshold(),\\n                tier.groupDiscountPercent() == null ? BigDecimal.ZERO : tier.groupDiscountPercent()\\n            ))\\n            .toList();\\n        groupDiscountRuleRepository.saveAll(rules);\\n    }\\n\\n    private String normalize(String value) {\\n        return value == null ? \\\"\\\" : value.toLowerCase(Locale.ROOT).trim();\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/GaInventoryService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingPricingTierResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis.GaInventoryRedisService;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class GaInventoryService {\\n\\n    private final GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService;\\n\\n    public GaInventoryService(GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService) {\\n        this.gaInventoryRedisService = gaInventoryRedisService;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void initCounters(Long slotId, List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tiers) {\\n        tiers.forEach(tier -> gaInventoryRedisService.init(slotId, tier.id(), tier.quota()));\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

## Entry 367
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T12:47:01.800Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T12:47:01.800Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_9vZ8X8Ri11NpqW6jlOdCAoXI",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/CartService.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockEvent;\n import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockState;\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.PaymentTimeoutEvent;\n@@\n import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n@@\n     public void handlePaymentTimeout(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, Long userId) {\n         eventPublisher.publishEvent(new PaymentTimeoutEvent(cartId, seatIds, userId));\n     }\n+\n+    @Transactional\n+    public void onBookingConfirmed(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, String orderId, Long userId) {\n+        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n+        for (Long seatId : seatIds) {\n+            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(seatId).orElse(null);\n+            if (seat == null) {\n+                continue;\n+            }\n+            if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n+                continue;\n+            }\n+            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n+            if (previous == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED) {\n+                seat.markPaymentPending();\n+            }\n+            seat.confirm(orderId);\n+            seatRepository.save(seat);\n+            seatLockRedisService.release(seatId, userId);\n+            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.CONFIRMED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM_PAYMENT, \"ORDER_PLACED\", orderId);\n+        }\n+        cart.confirm();\n+        cartRepository.save(cart);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Transactional\n+    public void onPaymentFailed(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, Long userId) {\n+        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n+        for (Long seatId : seatIds) {\n+            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(seatId).orElse(null);\n+            if (seat == null || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.AVAILABLE || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n+                continue;\n+            }\n+            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n+            seat.release(LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_FAILED);\n+            seatRepository.save(seat);\n+            seatLockRedisService.release(seatId, userId);\n+            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_FAILED.name(), null);\n+        }\n+        cart.abandon();\n+        cartRepository.save(cart);\n+    }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

{
  "payload": {

    "call_id": "call_9vZ8X8Ri11NpqW6jlOdCAoXI",

    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/CartService.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockEvent;\n import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockState;\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.PaymentTimeoutEvent;\n@@\n import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n@@\n     public void handlePaymentTimeout(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, Long userId) {\n         eventPublisher.publishEvent(new PaymentTimeoutEvent(cartId, seatIds, userId));\n     }\n+\n+    @Transactional\n+    public void onBookingConfirmed(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, String orderId, Long userId) {\n+        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n+        for (Long seatId : seatIds) {\n+            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(seatId).orElse(null);\n+            if (seat == null) {\n+                continue;\n+            }\n+            if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n+                continue;\n+            }\n+            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n+            if (previous == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED) {\n+                seat.markPaymentPending();\n+            }\n+            seat.confirm(orderId);\n+            seatRepository.save(seat);\n+            seatLockRedisService.release(seatId, userId);\n+            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.CONFIRMED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM_PAYMENT, \"ORDER_PLACED\", orderId);\n+        }\n+        cart.confirm();\n+        cartRepository.save(cart);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Transactional\n+    public void onPaymentFailed(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, Long userId) {\n+        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n+        for (Long seatId : seatIds) {\n+            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(seatId).orElse(null);\n+            if (seat == null || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.AVAILABLE || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n+                continue;\n+            }\n+            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n+            seat.release(LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_FAILED);\n+            seatRepository.save(seat);\n+            seatLockRedisService.release(seatId, userId);\n+            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_FAILED.name(), null);\n+        }\n+        cart.abandon();\n+        cartRepository.save(cart);\n+    }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}

from = seat.getLockState();\\n            seat.release(LockReleaseReason.TTL_EXPIRED);\\n            seatRepository.save(seat);\\n            if (lockedUser != null) {\\n   seat.getShowSlotId(),\\n                lockedUser,\\n                from,\\n                SeatLockState.AVAILABLE,\\n                SeatLockEvent.RELEASE,\\n lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\\nimport org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Scheduled;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Slf4j\\n@Component\\npublic class CartExpiryCleanupJob {\\n\\n    private final CartRepository cartRepository;\\n    private final CartItemRepository cartItemRepository;\\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\\n    private final SeatLockAuditLogRepository auditRepository;\\n    private final SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService;\\n\\n    public CartExpiryCleanupJob(\\n        CartRepository cartRepository,\\n        CartItemRepository cartItemRepository,\\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\\n        SeatLockAuditLogRepository auditRepository,\\n        SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService\\n    ) {\\n        this.cartRepository = cartRepository;\\n        this.cartItemRepository = @Scheduled(fixedDelay = 300000)\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void expirePendingCarts() {\\n        for (Cart cart : cartRepository.findByStatusAndExpiresAtBefore(CartStatus.PENDING, Instant.now())) {\\n            cart.expire();\\n            cartRepository.save(cart);\\n            for (CartItem item : cartItemRepository.findByCartId(cart.getId())) {\\n                if (item.getSeatId() == null) {\\n                    continue;\\n                }\\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId()).orElse(null);\\n                if (seat == null) {\\n                    continue;\\n                }\\n                if (seat.getLockState() != SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED) {\\n                    continue;\\n                }\\n                SeatLockState from = seat.getLockState();\\n                seat.release(LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED);\\n                seatRepository.save(seat);\\n                seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), cart.getUserId());\\n                auditRepository.save(new SeatLockAuditLog(\\n                    seat.getId(),\\n                    null,\\n                    seat.getShowSlotId(),\\n                    cart.getUserId(),\\n                    from,\\n                    SeatLockState.AVAILABLE,\\n                    SeatLockEvent.RELEASE,\\n                    LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED.name(),\\n                    null\\n                ));\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat >
