com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.IntegrationException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbTicketClassResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbAuthException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTicketService;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTokenStore;\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport java.util.ArrayList;\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Objects;\nimport java.util.Set;\nimport java.util.function.Function;\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\nimport org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class CartService {\n\n    private static final Duration SOFT_LOCK_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(5);\n    private static final Duration HARD_LOCK_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(30);\n\n    private final CartRepository cartRepository;\n    private final CartItemRepository cartItemRepository;\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\n    private final GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository;\n    private final SeatLockAuditLogRepository seatLockAuditLogRepository;\n    private final SlotValidationService slotValidationService;\n    private final SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient;\n    private final SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService;\n    private final GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService;\n    private final CartPricingService cartPricingService;\n    private final ConflictResolutionService conflictResolutionService;\n    private final CartMapper cartMapper;\n    private final EbTicketService ebTicketService;\n    private final EbTokenStore ebTokenStore;\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\n\n    public CartService(\n        CartRepository cartRepository,\n        CartItemRepository cartItemRepository,\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\n        GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository,\n        SeatLockAuditLogRepository seatLockAuditLogRepository,\n        SlotValidationService slotValidationService,\n        SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient,\n        SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService,\n        GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService,\n        CartPricingService cartPricingService,\n        ConflictResolutionService conflictResolutionService,\n        CartMapper cartMapper,\n        EbTicketService ebTicketService,\n        EbTokenStore ebTokenStore,\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher,\n        StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate\n    ) {\n        this.cartRepository = cartRepository;\n        this.cartItemRepository = cartItemRepository;\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\n        this.gaInventoryClaimRepository = gaInventoryClaimRepository;\n        this.seatLockAuditLogRepository = seatLockAuditLogRepository;\n        this.slotValidationService = slotValidationService;\n        this.schedulingSlotClient = schedulingSlotClient;\n        this.seatLockRedisService = seatLockRedisService;\n        this.gaInventoryRedisService = gaInventoryRedisService;\n        this.cartPricingService = cartPricingService;\n        this.conflictResolutionService = conflictResolutionService;\n        this.cartMapper = cartMapper;\n        this.ebTicketService = ebTicketService;\n        this.ebTokenStore = ebTokenStore;\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse addSeat(Long userId, Long orgId, String role, AddSeatRequest request) {\n        slotValidationService.ensureUserActive(role);\n        SchedulingSlotResponse slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(request.slotId());\n        List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tiers = schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(request.slotId());\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\n\n        SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier = tierById.get(request.tierId());\n        if (tier == null) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Pricing tier not found for slot\", \"TIER_NOT_FOUND\");\n        }\n        slotValidationService.ensureTierSynced(request.tierId(), tier.ebTicketClassId());\n        assertOrgConnected(orgId);\n\n        Cart cart = getOrCreatePendingCart(userId, slot, orgId, tier.currency());\n\n        if (slot.seatingMode() == com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode.RESERVED) {\n            if (request.seatId() == null) {\n                throw new BusinessRuleException(\"seatId is required for RESERVED mode\", \"SEAT_ID_REQUIRED\");\n            }\n            addReservedSeat(userId, cart, tierById, request, tier);\n        } else {\n            addGaTier(userId, cart, request, tier);\n        }\n\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse removeItem(Long userId, Long itemId) {\n        CartItem item = cartItemRepository.findByIdAndCartUserId(itemId, userId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CartItemNotFoundException(itemId));\n\n        Cart cart = item.getCart();\n        if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId())\n                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat not found\", \"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n            if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED\n                || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.PAYMENT_PENDING\n                || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                throw new BaseException(\"Seat removal not allowed\", \"SEAT_REMOVAL_NOT_ALLOWED\", HttpStatus.CONFLICT,\n                    Map.of(\"lockState\", seat.getLockState().name())) {\n                };\n            }\n            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n            seat.release(LockReleaseReason.USER_REMOVED);\n            seatRepository.save(seat);\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.USER_REMOVED.name(), null);\n        } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n            gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\n            });\n        }\n\n        cart.removeItem(item);\n        cartItemRepository.delete(item);\n\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById = fetchTierMap(cart.getShowSlotId());\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public CartResponse getCart(Long userId, Long cartId) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(cartId);\n        }\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, fetchTierMap(cart.getShowSlotId()));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse confirm(Long userId, Long orgId, ConfirmCartRequest request) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(request.cartId()).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId()));\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId());\n        }\n        cart.ensurePending();\n        if (cart.isExpired(Instant.now())) {\n            throw new CartExpiredException(cart.getId(), cart.getExpiresAt());\n        }\n\n        List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tiers = schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(cart.getShowSlotId());\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\n        SchedulingSlotResponse slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(cart.getShowSlotId());\n\n        Set<Long> expiredSeatIds = cart.getItems().stream()\n            .map(CartItem::getSeatId)\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\n            .filter(seatId -> !seatLockRedisService.isOwnedBy(seatId, userId))\n            .collect(Collectors.toSet());\n        if (!expiredSeatIds.isEmpty()) {\n            throw new SoftLockExpiredException(expiredSeatIds);\n        }\n\n        Map<String, Long> ticketClassToTier = tierById.values().stream()\n            .filter(t -> t.ebTicketClassId() != null)\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::ebTicketClassId, SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, (a, b) -> a));\n\n        for (String ticketClassId : cart.getItems().stream().map(CartItem::getEbTicketClassId).collect(Collectors.toSet())) {\n            EbTicketClassResponse ticketClass;\n            try {\n                ticketClass = ebTicketService.getTicketClass(slot.ebEventId(), ticketClassId);\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                throw new BaseException(\"Eventbrite unavailable\", \"EB_UNAVAILABLE\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n                    Map.of(\"retryAfterSeconds\", 10)) {\n                };\n            }\n            if (ticketClass != null && \"SOLD_OUT\".equalsIgnoreCase(ticketClass.onSaleStatus())) {\n                Long soldOutTierId = ticketClassToTier.get(ticketClassId);\n                releaseTierLocks(cart, userId, soldOutTierId);\n                List<Map<String, Object>> alternativeTiers = tierById.values().stream()\n                    .filter(t -> !Objects.equals(t.id(), soldOutTierId))\n                    .map(t -> Map.<String, Object>of(\"tierId\", t.id(), \"tierName\", t.name()))\n                    .toList();\n                throw new TierSoldOutException(soldOutTierId, Map.of(\"otherTiers\", alternativeTiers));\n            }\n        }\n\n        for (CartItem item : cart.getItems()) {\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId())\n                    .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat not found\", \"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n                try {\n                    if (!seatLockRedisService.extend(seat.getId(), userId, HARD_LOCK_TTL)) {\n                        throw new HardLockException(\"Failed to extend Redis lock for seat=\" + seat.getId());\n                    }\n                    SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n                    seat.hardLock(HARD_LOCK_TTL);\n                    seatRepository.save(seat);\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM, null, null);\n                } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                    throw ex;\n                }\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                    claim.hardLock(Instant.now().plus(HARD_LOCK_TTL));\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.save(claim);\n                });\n            }\n        }\n\n        cart.extendTtl(HARD_LOCK_TTL);\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CartAssembledEvent(\n            cart.getId(),\n            cart.getShowSlotId(),\n            cart.getUserId(),\n            cart.getOrgId(),\n            slot.ebEventId(),\n            cart.getCouponCode()\n        ));\n\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void abandon(Long userId, AbandonCartRequest request) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(request.cartId()).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId()));\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId());\n        }\n\n        for (CartItem item : new ArrayList<>(cart.getItems())) {\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId()).orElse(null);\n                if (seat != null && seat.getLockState() != SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                    SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n                    seat.release(LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED);\n                    seatRepository.save(seat);\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED.name(), null);\n                }\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                    gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\n                });\n            }\n            cart.removeItem(item);\n            cartItemRepository.delete(item);\n        }\n\n        cart.abandon();\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void handlePaymentTimeout(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, Long userId) {\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new PaymentTimeoutEvent(cartId, seatIds, userId));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onBookingConfirmed(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, String orderId, Long userId) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n        for (Long seatId : seatIds) {\n            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(seatId).orElse(null);\n            if (seat == null) {\n                continue;\n            }\n            if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                continue;\n            }\n            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n            if (previous == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED) {\n                seat.markPaymentPending();\n            }\n            seat.confirm(orderId);\n            seatRepository.save(seat);\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seatId, userId);\n            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.CONFIRMED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM_PAYMENT, \"ORDER_PLACED\", orderId);\n        }\n"
  }
}
```

com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbAuthException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTicketService;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTokenStore;\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport java.util.ArrayList;\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Objects;\nimport java.util.Set;\nimport java.util.function.Function;\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\nimport org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class CartService {\n\n    private static final Duration SOFT_LOCK_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(5);\n    private static final Duration HARD_LOCK_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(30);\n\n    private final CartRepository cartRepository;\n    private final CartItemRepository cartItemRepository;\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\n    private final GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository;\n    private final SeatLockAuditLogRepository seatLockAuditLogRepository;\n    private final SlotValidationService slotValidationService;\n    private final SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient;\n    private final SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService;\n    private final GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService;\n    private final CartPricingService cartPricingService;\n    private final ConflictResolutionService conflictResolutionService;\n    private final CartMapper cartMapper;\n    private final EbTicketService ebTicketService;\n    private final EbTokenStore ebTokenStore;\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\n\n    public CartService(\n        CartRepository cartRepository,\n        CartItemRepository cartItemRepository,\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\n        GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository,\n        SeatLockAuditLogRepository seatLockAuditLogRepository,\n        SlotValidationService slotValidationService,\n        SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient,\n        SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService,\n        GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService,\n        CartPricingService cartPricingService,\n        ConflictResolutionService conflictResolutionService,\n        CartMapper cartMapper,\n        EbTicketService ebTicketService,\n        EbTokenStore ebTokenStore,\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher,\n        StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate\n    ) {\n        this.cartRepository = cartRepository;\n        this.cartItemRepository = cartItemRepository;\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\n        this.gaInventoryClaimRepository = gaInventoryClaimRepository;\n        this.seatLockAuditLogRepository = seatLockAuditLogRepository;\n        this.slotValidationService = slotValidationService;\n        this.schedulingSlotClient = schedulingSlotClient;\n        this.seatLockRedisService = seatLockRedisService;\n        this.gaInventoryRedisService = gaInventoryRedisService;\n        this.cartPricingService = cartPricingService;\n        this.conflictResolutionService = conflictResolutionService;\n        this.cartMapper = cartMapper;\n        this.ebTicketService = ebTicketService;\n        this.ebTokenStore = ebTokenStore;\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse addSeat(Long userId, Long orgId, String role, AddSeatRequest request) {\n        slotValidationService.ensureUserActive(role);\n        SchedulingSlotResponse slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(request.slotId());\n        List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tiers = schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(request.slotId());\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\n\n        SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier = tierById.get(request.tierId());\n        if (tier == null) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Pricing tier not found for slot\", \"TIER_NOT_FOUND\");\n        }\n        slotValidationService.ensureTierSynced(request.tierId(), tier.ebTicketClassId());\n        assertOrgConnected(orgId);\n\n        Cart cart = getOrCreatePendingCart(userId, slot, orgId, tier.currency());\n\n        if (slot.seatingMode() == com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode.RESERVED) {\n            if (request.seatId() == null) {\n                throw new BusinessRuleException(\"seatId is required for RESERVED mode\", \"SEAT_ID_REQUIRED\");\n            }\n            addReservedSeat(userId, cart, tierById, request, tier);\n        } else {\n            addGaTier(userId, cart, request, tier);\n        }\n\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse removeItem(Long userId, Long itemId) {\n        CartItem item = cartItemRepository.findByIdAndCartUserId(itemId, userId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CartItemNotFoundException(itemId));\n\n        Cart cart = item.getCart();\n        if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId())\n                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat not found\", \"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n            if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED\n                || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.PAYMENT_PENDING\n                || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                throw new BaseException(\"Seat removal not allowed\", \"SEAT_REMOVAL_NOT_ALLOWED\", HttpStatus.CONFLICT,\n                    Map.of(\"lockState\", seat.getLockState().name())) {\n                };\n            }\n            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n            seat.release(LockReleaseReason.USER_REMOVED);\n            seatRepository.save(seat);\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.USER_REMOVED.name(), null);\n        } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n            gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\n            });\n        }\n\n        cart.removeItem(item);\n        cartItemRepository.delete(item);\n\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById = fetchTierMap(cart.getShowSlotId());\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public CartResponse getCart(Long userId, Long cartId) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(cartId);\n        }\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, fetchTierMap(cart.getShowSlotId()));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse confirm(Long userId, Long orgId, ConfirmCartRequest request) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(request.cartId()).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId()));\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId());\n        }\n        cart.ensurePending();\n        if (cart.isExpired(Instant.now())) {\n            throw new CartExpiredException(cart.getId(), cart.getExpiresAt());\n        }\n\n        List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tiers = schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(cart.getShowSlotId());\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\n        SchedulingSlotResponse slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(cart.getShowSlotId());\n\n        Set<Long> expiredSeatIds = cart.getItems().stream()\n            .map(CartItem::getSeatId)\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\n            .filter(seatId -> !seatLockRedisService.isOwnedBy(seatId, userId))\n            .collect(Collectors.toSet());\n        if (!expiredSeatIds.isEmpty()) {\n            throw new SoftLockExpiredException(expiredSeatIds);\n        }\n\n        Map<String, Long> ticketClassToTier = tierById.values().stream()\n            .filter(t -> t.ebTicketClassId() != null)\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::ebTicketClassId, SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, (a, b) -> a));\n\n        for (String ticketClassId : cart.getItems().stream().map(CartItem::getEbTicketClassId).collect(Collectors.toSet())) {\n            EbTicketClassResponse ticketClass;\n            try {\n                ticketClass = ebTicketService.getTicketClass(slot.ebEventId(), ticketClassId);\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                throw new BaseException(\"Eventbrite unavailable\", \"EB_UNAVAILABLE\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n                    Map.of(\"retryAfterSeconds\", 10)) {\n                };\n            }\n            if (ticketClass != null && \"SOLD_OUT\".equalsIgnoreCase(ticketClass.onSaleStatus())) {\n                Long soldOutTierId = ticketClassToTier.get(ticketClassId);\n                releaseTierLocks(cart, userId, soldOutTierId);\n                List<Map<String, Object>> alternativeTiers = tierById.values().stream()\n                    .filter(t -> !Objects.equals(t.id(), soldOutTierId))\n                    .map(t -> Map.<String, Object>of(\"tierId\", t.id(), \"tierName\", t.name()))\n                    .toList();\n                throw new TierSoldOutException(soldOutTierId, Map.of(\"otherTiers\", alternativeTiers));\n            }\n        }\n\n        for (CartItem item : cart.getItems()) {\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId())\n                    .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat not found\", \"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n                try {\n                    if (!seatLockRedisService.extend(seat.getId(), userId, HARD_LOCK_TTL)) {\n                        throw new HardLockException(\"Failed to extend Redis lock for seat=\" + seat.getId());\n                    }\n                    SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n                    seat.hardLock(HARD_LOCK_TTL);\n                    seatRepository.save(seat);\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM, null, null);\n                } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                    throw ex;\n                }\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                    claim.hardLock(Instant.now().plus(HARD_LOCK_TTL));\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.save(claim);\n                });\n            }\n        }\n\n        cart.extendTtl(HARD_LOCK_TTL);\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CartAssembledEvent(\n            cart.getId(),\n            cart.getShowSlotId(),\n            cart.getUserId(),\n            cart.getOrgId(),\n            slot.ebEventId(),\n            cart.getCouponCode()\n        ));\n\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void abandon(Long userId, AbandonCartRequest request) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(request.cartId()).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId()));\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId());\n        }\n\n        for (CartItem item : new ArrayList<>(cart.getItems())) {\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId()).orElse(null);\n                if (seat != null && seat.getLockState() != SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                    SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n                    seat.release(LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED);\n                    seatRepository.save(seat);\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED.name(), null);\n                }\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                    gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\n                });\n            }\n            cart.removeItem(item);\n            cartItemRepository.delete(item);\n        }\n\n        cart.abandon();\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void handlePaymentTimeout(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, Long userId) {\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new PaymentTimeoutEvent(cartId, seatIds, userId));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onBookingConfirmed(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, String orderId, Long userId) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n        for (Long seatId : seatIds) {\n            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(seatId).orElse(null);\n            if (seat == null) {\n                continue;\n            }\n            if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                continue;\n            }\n            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n            if (previous == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED) {\n                seat.markPaymentPending();\n            }\n            seat.confirm(orderId);\n            seatRepository.save(seat);\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seatId, userId);\n            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.CONFIRMED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM_PAYMENT, \"ORDER_PLACED\", orderId);\n        }\n"
  }
}

**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T13:58:09.893Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_hNd4Z9FG13Ua4NqtOqYjq6pO",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 0938ff\nWall time: 0.0513 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 2224\nOutput:\n        }\n        cart.confirm();\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onPaymentFailed(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, Long userId) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n        for (Long seatId : seatIds) {\n            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(seatId).orElse(null);\n            if (seat == null || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.AVAILABLE || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                continue;\n            }\n            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n            seat.release(LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_FAILED);\n            seatRepository.save(seat);\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seatId, userId);\n            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_FAILED.name(), null);\n        }\n        cart.abandon();\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n    }\n\n    private Cart getOrCreatePendingCart(Long userId, SchedulingSlotResponse slot, Long orgId, String currency) {\n        return cartRepository.findByUserIdAndShowSlotIdAndStatus(userId, slot.id(), CartStatus.PENDING)\n            .orElseGet(() -> {\n                try {\n                    Cart created = new Cart(userId, slot.id(), orgId, slot.seatingMode(), SOFT_LOCK_TTL, currency);\n                    return cartRepository.save(created);\n                } catch (DataIntegrityViolationException ex) {\n                    return cartRepository.findByUserIdAndShowSlotIdAndStatus(userId, slot.id(), CartStatus.PENDING)\n                        .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Pending cart already exists\", \"CART_ALREADY_EXISTS\"));\n                }\n            });\n    }\n\n    private void addReservedSeat(\n        Long userId,\n        Cart cart,\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById,\n        AddSeatRequest request,\n        SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier\n    ) {\n        Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(request.seatId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat not found\", \"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n\n        if (!Objects.equals(seat.getShowSlotId(), request.slotId()) || !Objects.equals(seat.getPricingTierId(), request.tierId())) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat does not belong to slot/tier\", \"SEAT_MISMATCH\");\n        }\n\n        AcquireResult result = seatLockRedisService.acquire(seat.getId(), userId, SOFT_LOCK_TTL);\n        if (result == AcquireResult.CONFLICT) {\n            throw new SeatUnavailableException(seat.getId(), conflictResolutionService.alternativesFor(seat));\n        }\n\n        if (result == AcquireResult.ACQUIRED && !seat.isSelectable(Instant.now())) {\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n            throw new SeatUnavailableException(seat.getId(), conflictResolutionService.alternativesFor(seat));\n        }\n\n        try {\n            if (result == AcquireResult.ACQUIRED) {\n                SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n                seat.softLock(userId, SOFT_LOCK_TTL);\n                seatRepository.save(seat);\n                writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.SELECT, null, null);\n            }\n\n            if (!cartItemRepository.existsByCartIdAndSeatId(cart.getId(), seat.getId())) {\n                CartItem item = new CartItem(\n                    seat.getId(),\n                    null,\n                    seat.getPricingTierId(),\n                    seat.getEbTicketClassId(),\n                    new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\n                    1\n                );\n                cart.addItem(item);\n                cartItemRepository.save(item);\n            }\n        } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n            throw new SeatLockException(\"DB failure while soft-locking seat=\" + seat.getId());\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void addGaTier(Long userId, Cart cart, AddSeatRequest request, SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier) {\n        String blocked = stringRedisTemplate.opsForValue().get(\"tier:blocked:\" + request.slotId() + \":\" + request.tierId());\n        if (blocked != null) {\n            throw new TierBlockedException(request.tierId());\n        }\n\n        long claimResult = gaInventoryRedisService.claim(request.slotId(), request.tierId(), request.quantity());\n        if (claimResult == -2) {\n            throw new BaseException(\"GA counter not initialized\", \"GA_COUNTER_NOT_INITIALIZED\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE) {\n            };\n        }\n        if (claimResult < 0) {\n            throw new BaseException(\n                \"Insufficient GA inventory\",\n                \"INSUFFICIENT_GA_INVENTORY\",\n                HttpStatus.CONFLICT,\n                Map.of(\"tierId\", request.tierId(), \"requested\", request.quantity(), \"available\", 0)\n            ) {\n            };\n        }\n\n        GaInventoryClaim claim = new GaInventoryClaim(\n            request.slotId(),\n            request.tierId(),\n            userId,\n            cart.getId(),\n            request.quantity(),\n            Instant.now().plus(SOFT_LOCK_TTL)\n        );\n        claim = gaInventoryClaimRepository.save(claim);\n\n        CartItem item = new CartItem(\n            null,\n            claim.getId(),\n            request.tierId(),\n            tier.ebTicketClassId(),\n            new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\n            request.quantity()\n        );\n        cart.addItem(item);\n        cartItemRepository.save(item);\n    }\n\n    private Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> fetchTierMap(Long slotId) {\n        return schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(slotId).stream()\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\n    }\n\n    private CartResponse buildCartResponse(Cart cart, Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById) {\n        List<CartItem> items = cartItemRepository.findByCartId(cart.getId());\n        CartPricingResult pricing = cartPricingService.recompute(cart, items);\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n\n        Map<Long, String> tierNames = tierById.values().stream()\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, SchedulingPricingTierResponse::name, (a, b) -> a));\n\n        Map<Long, String> seatNumbers = new HashMap<>();\n        List<Long> seatIds = items.stream().map(CartItem::getSeatId).filter(Objects::nonNull).toList();\n        if (!seatIds.isEmpty()) {\n            seatRepository.findAllById(seatIds).forEach(seat -> seatNumbers.put(seat.getId(), seat.getSeatNumber()));\n        }\n\n        return cartMapper.toResponse(cart, items, pricing, tierNames, seatNumbers);\n    }\n\n    private void writeAudit(\n        Seat seat,\n        Long userId,\n        SeatLockState from,\n        SeatLockState to,\n        SeatLockEvent event,\n        String reason,\n        String orderId\n    ) {\n        seatLockAuditLogRepository.save(new SeatLockAuditLog(\n            seat.getId(),\n            null,\n            seat.getShowSlotId(),\n            userId,\n            from,\n            to,\n            event,\n            reason,\n            orderId\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private void assertOrgConnected(Long orgId) {\n        try {\n            ebTokenStore.getAccessToken(orgId);\n        } catch (EbAuthException ex) {\n            throw new BaseException(\"Organization is not connected to Eventbrite\", \"ORG_NOT_CONNECTED\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE) {\n            };\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void releaseTierLocks(Cart cart, Long userId, Long soldOutTierId) {\n        for (CartItem item : cart.getItems()) {\n            if (!Objects.equals(item.getPricingTierId(), soldOutTierId)) {\n                continue;\n            }\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId()).ifPresent(seat -> {\n                    if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED) {\n                        SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n                        seat.release(LockReleaseReason.TIER_SOLD_OUT);\n                        seatRepository.save(seat);\n                        seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                        writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.TIER_SOLD_OUT.name(), null);\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n            if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                    gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

seatRepository.save(seat);\n                writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.SELECT, null, null);\n            }\n\n            if (!cartItemRepository.existsByCartIdAndSeatId(cart.getId(), seat.getId())) {\n                CartItem item = new CartItem(\n                    seat.getId(),\n                    null,\n                    seat.getPricingTierId(),\n                    seat.getEbTicketClassId(),\n                    new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\n                    1\n                );\n                cart.addItem(item);\n                cartItemRepository.save(item);\n            }\n        } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n            throw new SeatLockException(\"DB failure while soft-locking seat=\" + seat.getId());\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void addGaTier(Long userId, Cart cart, AddSeatRequest request, SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier) {\n        String blocked = stringRedisTemplate.opsForValue().get(\"tier:blocked:\" + request.slotId() + \":\" + request.tierId());\n        if (blocked != null) {\n            throw new TierBlockedException(request.tierId());\n        }\n\n        long claimResult = gaInventoryRedisService.claim(request.slotId(), request.tierId(), request.quantity());\n        if (claimResult == -2) {\n            throw new BaseException(\"GA counter not initialized\", \"GA_COUNTER_NOT_INITIALIZED\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE) {\n            };\n        }\n        if (claimResult < 0) {\n            throw new BaseException(\n                \"Insufficient GA inventory\",\n                \"INSUFFICIENT_GA_INVENTORY\",\n                HttpStatus.CONFLICT,\n                Map.of(\"tierId\", request.tierId(), \"requested\", request.quantity(), \"available\", 0)\n            ) {\n            };\n        }\n\n        GaInventoryClaim claim = new GaInventoryClaim(\n            request.slotId(),\n            request.tierId(),\n            userId,\n            cart.getId(),\n            request.quantity(),\n            Instant.now().plus(SOFT_LOCK_TTL)\n        );\n        claim = gaInventoryClaimRepository.save(claim);\n\n        CartItem item = new CartItem(\n            null,\n            claim.getId(),\n            request.tierId(),\n            tier.ebTicketClassId(),\n            new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\n            request.quantity()\n        );\n        cart.addItem(item);\n        cartItemRepository.save(item);\n    }\n\n    private Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> fetchTierMap(Long slotId) {\n        return schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(slotId).stream()\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\n    }\n\n    private CartResponse buildCartResponse(Cart cart, Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierById) {\n        List<CartItem> items = cartItemRepository.findByCartId(cart.getId());\n        CartPricingResult pricing = cartPricingService.recompute(cart, items);\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n\n        Map<Long, String> tierNames = tierById.values().stream()\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, SchedulingPricingTierResponse::name, (a, b) -> a));\n\n        Map<Long, String> seatNumbers = new HashMap<>();\n        List<Long> seatIds = items.stream().map(CartItem::getSeatId).filter(Objects::nonNull).toList();\n        if (!seatIds.isEmpty()) {\n            seatRepository.findAllById(seatIds).forEach(seat -> seatNumbers.put(seat.getId(), seat.getSeatNumber()));\n        }\n\n        return cartMapper.toResponse(cart, items, pricing, tierNames, seatNumbers);\n    }\n\n    private void writeAudit(\n        Seat seat,\n        Long userId,\n        SeatLockState from,\n        SeatLockState to,\n        SeatLockEvent event,\n        String reason,\n        String orderId\n    ) {\n        seatLockAuditLogRepository.save(new SeatLockAuditLog(\n            seat.getId(),\n            null,\n            seat.getShowSlotId(),\n            userId,\n            from,\n            to,\n            event,\n            reason,\n            orderId\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private void assertOrgConnected(Long orgId) {\n        try {\n            ebTokenStore.getAccessToken(orgId);\n        } catch (EbAuthException ex) {\n            throw new BaseException(\"Organization is not connected to Eventbrite\", \"ORG_NOT_CONNECTED\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE) {\n            };\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void releaseTierLocks(Cart cart, Long userId, Long soldOutTierId) {\n        for (CartItem item : cart.getItems()) {\n            if (!Objects.equals(item.getPricingTierId(), soldOutTierId)) {\n                continue;\n            }\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId()).ifPresent(seat -> {\n                    if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED) {\n                        SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n                        seat.release(LockReleaseReason.TIER_SOLD_OUT);\n                        seatRepository.save(seat);\n                        seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                        writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.TIER_SOLD_OUT.name(), null);\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n            if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                    gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

slotValidationService;\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\n    private final SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient;\n    private final SeatMapper seatMapper;\n    private final GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService;\n    private final GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository;\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\n\n    public SeatAvailabilityService(\n        SlotValidationService slotValidationService,\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\n        SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient,\n        SeatMapper seatMapper,\n        GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService,\n        GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository,\n        StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate\n    ) {\n        this.slotValidationService = slotValidationService;\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\n        this.schedulingSlotClient = schedulingSlotClient;\n        this.seatMapper = seatMapper;\n        this.gaInventoryRedisService = gaInventoryRedisService;\n        this.gaInventoryClaimRepository = gaInventoryClaimRepository;\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\n    }\n\n    public AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse getAvailability(Long slotId) {\n        SchedulingSlotResponse slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(slotId);\n        List<SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tiers = schedulingSlotClient.getPricingTiers(slotId);\n        Map<Long, SchedulingPricingTierResponse> tierMap = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(SchedulingPricingTierResponse::id, Function.identity()));\n\n        if (slot.seatingMode() == SeatingMode.RESERVED) {\n            List<AvailableSeatResponse> seats = seatRepository.findAvailableForSlot(slotId, java.time.Instant.now())\n                .stream()\n                .map(seat -> {\n                    SchedulingPricingTierResponse tier = tierMap.get(seat.getPricingTierId());\n                    String tierName = tier == null ? null : tier.name();\n                    BigDecimal amount = tier == null ? BigDecimal.ZERO : tier.priceAmount();\n                    String currency = tier == null ? \"INR\" : tier.currency();\n                    return seatMapper.toAvailableSeatResponse(seat, tierName, amount, currency);\n                })\n                .toList();\n            return new AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse(slotId, slot.seatingMode(), seats, List.of());\n        }\n\n        List<GaTierAvailabilityResponse> gaTiers = tiers.stream()\n            .map(tier -> {\n                Long available = gaInventoryRedisService.getCurrent(slotId, tier.id());\n                if (available == null) {\n                    long confirmed = gaInventoryClaimRepository.countByShowSlotIdAndPricingTierIdAndLockState(slotId, tier.id(), SeatLockState.CONFIRMED);\n                    available = Math.max(0, tier.quota() - confirmed);\n                }\n                boolean blocked = Boolean.TRUE.equals(stringRedisTemplate.hasKey(\"tier:blocked:\" + slotId + \":\" + tier.id()));\n                return new GaTierAvailabilityResponse(\n                    tier.id(),\n                    tier.name(),\n                    tier.quota(),\n                    available,\n                    new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\n                    blocked\n                );\n            })\n            .toList();\n\n        return new AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse(slotId, slot.seatingMode(), List.of(), gaTiers);\n    }\n}\n"
  }

      .thenReturn(new CatalogVenueResponse(10L, 20L, \"eb-1\", \"Venue\", \"Addr\", 100, SeatingMode.GA));\n        when(ebEventSyncService.createDraft(eq(1L), any())).thenReturn(new EbEventDto(\"eb-1\", null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null));\n\n        ShowSlot result = showSlotService.submitSlot(1L, 1L);\n\n        verify(stateMachineService).sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.SUBMIT);\n        assertThat(result.getEbEventId()).isEqualTo(\"eb-1\");\n        ArgumentCaptor<SlotDraftCreatedEvent> captor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(SlotDraftCreatedEvent.class);\n        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(captor.capture());\n        assertThat(captor.getValue().ebEventId()).isEqualTo(\"eb-1\");\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_increment_syncAttemptCount_and_not_publish_success_event_when_createDraft_fails() {\n        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n        slot.addPricingTier(new ShowSlotPricingTier(\"General\", new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, \"INR\"), 10, TierType.FREE));\n        when(showSlotRepository.findById(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(slot));\n        when(venueCatalogClient.getVenue(slot.getVenueId()))\n            .thenReturn(new CatalogVenueResponse(10L, 20L, \"eb-1\", \"Venue\", \"Addr\", 100, SeatingMode.GA));\n        when(ebEventSyncService.createDraft(eq(1L), any())).thenThrow(new EbIntegrationException(\"boom\"));\n\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> showSlotService.submitSlot(1L, 1L))\n            .isInstanceOf(EbIntegrationException.class);\n\n        assertThat(slot.getSyncAttemptCount()).isEqualTo(1);\n        verify(eventPublisher, never()).publishEvent(any(SlotDraftCreatedEvent.class));\n        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(SlotSyncFailedEvent.class));\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_transition_to_ACTIVE_when_publishEvent_succeeds() {\n        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n        slot.markPendingSync();\n        slot.setEbEventId(\"eb-1\");\n        when(showSlotRepository.findById(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(slot));\n        doAnswer(invocation -> {\n            slot.markActive();\n            return null;\n        }).when(stateMachineService).sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.EB_PUBLISHED);\n\n        showSlotService.onTicketSyncComplete(new com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncCompletedEvent(1L, \"eb-1\"));\n\n        assertThat(slot.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE);\n        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(ShowSlotActivatedEvent.class));\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_increment_syncAttemptCount_and_stay_PENDING_SYNC_when_publishEvent_fails() {\n        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n        slot.markPendingSync();\n        slot.setEbEventId(\"eb-1\");\n        when(showSlotRepository.findById(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(slot));\n        doAnswer(invocation -> { throw new EbIntegrationException(\"boom\"); })\n            .when(ebEventSyncService).publishEvent(eq(1L), eq(\"eb-1\"));\n\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> showSlotService.onTicketSyncComplete(\n            new com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncCompletedEvent(1L, \"eb-1\")))\n            .isInstanceOf(EbIntegrationException.class);\n\n        assertThat(slot.getSyncAttemptCount()).isEqualTo(1);\n        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(SlotSyncFailedEvent.class));\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_persist_update_and_call_updateEvent_when_slot_is_ACTIVE() {\n        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n        slot.markActive();\n        slot.setEbEventId(\"eb-1\");\n        when(showSlotRepository.findById(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(slot));\n        when(showSlotRepository.save(slot)).thenReturn(slot);\n\n        ShowSlotUpdateResult result = showSlotService.updateSlot(1L, 1L, new UpdateShowSlotRequest(\"New\", null, null, null, null, null));\n\n        assertThat(result.ebSyncFailed()).isFalse();\n        verify(ebEventSyncService).updateEvent(eq(1L), eq(\"eb-1\"), any());\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_persist_internal_update_and_return_207_when_EB_update_fails() {\n        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n        slot.markActive();\n        slot.setEbEventId(\"eb-1\");\n        when(showSlotRepository.findById(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(slot));\n assertThat(result.slot().getLastSyncError()).isNotNull();\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_throw_BusinessRuleException_when_updating_PENDING_SYNC_slot() {\n        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n        slot.markPendingSync();\n        when(showSlotRepository.findById(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(slot));\n\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> showSlotService.updateSlot(1L, 1L, new UpdateShowSlotRequest(\"New\", null, null, null, null, null)))\n            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class);\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void ## Entry 584
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T13:58:51.843Z
**Role/Type:** response_item

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T13:58:51.843Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/common/dto/SlotSummaryDto.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\\n\\npublic record SlotSummaryDto(\\n    Long slotId,\\n    String status,\\n    String ebEventId,\\n    SeatingMode seatingMode,\\n    Long orgId,\\n    Long venueId,\\n    Long cityId,\\n    String sourceSeatMapId\\n) {\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/common/dto/PricingTierDto.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\n\\npublic record PricingTierDto(\\n    Long tierId,\\n    String tierName,\\n    Money price,\\n    Integer quota,\\n    String tierType,\\n    String ebTicketClassId,\\n    String ebInventoryTierId,\\n    Integer groupDiscountThreshold,\\n    BigDecimal groupDiscountPercent\\n) {\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/common/service/SlotSummaryReader.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.common.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.SlotSummaryDto;\\n\\npublic interface SlotSummaryReader {\\n    SlotSummaryDto getSlotSummary(Long slotId);\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/common/service/SlotPricingReader.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.common.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PricingTierDto;\\nimport java.util.List;\\n\\npublic interface SlotPricingReader {\\n    List<PricingTierDto> getSlotPricing(Long slotId);\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_PTODArnYZ5CzVntlpesdI1AR"
  }
}
```

## Entry 589

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T13:59:07.712Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/SlotSummaryReaderImpl.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.SlotSummaryDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.ResourceNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.SlotSummaryReader;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class SlotSummaryReaderImpl implements SlotSummaryReader {\\n\\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\\n\\n    public SlotSummaryReaderImpl(ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository) {\\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public SlotSummaryDto getSlotSummary(Long slotId) {\\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotRepository.findById(slotId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new ResourceNotFoundException(\\\"Slot not found: \\\" + slotId, \\\"SLOT_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n\\n        return new SlotSummaryDto(\\n            slot.getId(),\\n            slot.getStatus().name(),\\n            slot.getEbEventId(),\\n            slot.getSeatingMode(),\\n            slot.getOrganizationId(),\\n            slot.getVenueId(),\\n            slot.getCityId(),\\n            slot.getSourceSeatMapId()\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/SlotPricingReaderImpl.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlotPricingTier;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotPricingTierRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PricingTierDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.ResourceNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.SlotPricingReader;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class SlotPricingReaderImpl implements SlotPricingReader {\\n\\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\\n    private final ShowSlotPricingTierRepository showSlotPricingTierRepository;\\n\\n    public SlotPricingReaderImpl(\\n        ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository,\\n        ShowSlotPricingTierRepository showSlotPricingTierRepository\\n    ) {\\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\\n        this.showSlotPricingTierRepository = showSlotPricingTierRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public List<PricingTierDto> getSlotPricing(Long slotId) {\\n        if (!showSlotRepository.existsById(slotId)) {\\n            throw new ResourceNotFoundException(\\\"Slot not found: \\\" + slotId, \\\"SLOT_NOT_FOUND\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        List<ShowSlotPricingTier> tiers = showSlotPricingTierRepository.findBySlotId(slotId);\\n        if (tiers.isEmpty()) {\\n            return List.of();\\n        }\\n\\n        return tiers.stream()\\n            .map(tier -> new PricingTierDto(\\n                tier.getId(),\\n                tier.getName(),\\n                tier.getPrice(),\\n                tier.getQuota(),\\n                tier.getTierType().name(),\\n                tier.getEbTicketClassId(),\\n                tier.getEbInventoryTierId(),\\n                tier.getGroupDiscountThreshold(),\\n                tier.getGroupDiscountPercent()\\n            ))\\n            .toList();\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_M2IPSylaLDfXTZfGqaSjzagr"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T13:59:45.812Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/CartPricingService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Cart;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.CartItem;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.GroupDiscountRule;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.GroupDiscountRuleRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PricingTierDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.SlotPricingReader;\\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException;\\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.core.type.TypeReference;\\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.math.RoundingMode;\\nimport java.time.Duration;\\nimport java.util.HashMap;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport java.util.function.Function;\\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Qualifier;\\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class CartPricingService {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CartPricingService.class);\\n    private static final Duration PRICING_CACHE_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(10);\\n\\n    public record CartPricingResult(\\n        Money subtotal,\\n        Money discount,\\n        Money total,\\n        Map<Long, Money> itemDiscounts\\n    ) {\\n    }\\n\\n    private final GroupDiscountRuleRepository groupDiscountRuleRepository;\\n    private final SlotPricingReader slotPricingReader;\\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\\n    private final ObjectMapper redisObjectMapper;\\n\\n    public CartPricingService(\\n        GroupDiscountRuleRepository groupDiscountRuleRepository,\\n        SlotPricingReader slotPricingReader,\\n        StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate,\\n        @Qualifier(\\\"redisObjectMapper\\\") ObjectMapper redisObjectMapper\\n    ) {\\n        this.groupDiscountRuleRepository = groupDiscountRuleRepository;\\n        this.slotPricingReader = slotPricingReader;\\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\\n        this.redisObjectMapper = redisObjectMapper;\\n    }\\n\\n    public List<PricingTierDto> getSlotPricingCached(Long slotId) {\\n        String key = pricingCacheKey(slotId);\\n\\n        try {\\n            String cachedJson = stringRedisTemplate.opsForValue().get(key);\\n            if (cachedJson != null && !cachedJson.isBlank()) {\\n                return redisObjectMapper.readValue(cachedJson, new TypeReference<List<PricingTierDto>>() {\\n                });\\n            }\\n        } catch (JsonProcessingException ex) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Failed to deserialize pricing cache. slotId={} reason={}\\\", slotId, ex.getMessage());\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Failed to read pricing cache. slotId={} reason={}\\\", slotId, ex.getMessage());\\n        }\\n\\n        List<PricingTierDto> pricing = slotPricingReader.getSlotPricing(slotId);\\n\\n        try {\\n            String payload = redisObjectMapper.writeValueAsString(pricing);\\n            stringRedisTemplate.opsForValue().set(key, payload, PRICING_CACHE_TTL);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Failed to write pricing cache. slotId={} reason={}\\\", slotId, ex.getMessage());\\n        }\\n\\n        return pricing;\\n    }\\n\\n    public CartPricingResult recompute(Cart cart, List<CartItem> items) {\\n        if (items.isEmpty()) {\\n            Money zero = new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, cart.getDiscountAmount().currency());\\n            cart.setDiscountAmount(zero);\\n            return new CartPricingResult(zero, zero, zero, Map.of());\\n        }\\n\\n        String currency = items.getFirst().getBasePrice().currency();\\n        BigDecimal subtotalAmount = items.stream()\\n            .map(this::lineAmount)\\n            .reduce(BigDecimal.ZERO, BigDecimal::add);\\n\\n        Map<Long, List<CartItem>> byTier = items.stream().collect(Collectors.groupingBy(CartItem::getPricingTierId));\\n        Map<Long, GroupDiscountRule> rulesByTier = groupDiscountRuleRepository.findByShowSlotId(cart.getShowSlotId()).stream()\\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(GroupDiscountRule::getPricingTierId, Function.identity(), (a, b) -> a));\\n\\n        BigDecimal totalDiscount = BigDecimal.ZERO;\\n        Map<Long, Money> itemDiscounts = new HashMap<>();\\n\\n        for (Map.Entry<Long, List<CartItem>> entry : byTier.entrySet()) {\\n            Long tierId = entry.getKey();\\n            List<CartItem> tierItems = entry.getValue();\\n            GroupDiscountRule rule = rulesByTier.get(tierId);\\n            if (rule == null || rule.getGroupDiscountThreshold() == null || rule.getGroupDiscountPercent() == null) {\\n                tierItems.forEach(item -> itemDiscounts.put(item.getId(), new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, currency)));\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n\\n            int count = tierItems.stream().mapToInt(CartItem::getQuantity).sum();\\n            if (count < rule.getGroupDiscountThreshold()) {\\n                tierItems.forEach(item -> itemDiscounts.put(item.getId(), new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, currency)));\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n\\n            BigDecimal tierSubtotal = tierItems.stream().map(this::lineAmount).reduce(BigDecimal.ZERO, BigDecimal::add);\\n            BigDecimal tierDiscount = tierSubtotal\\n                .multiply(rule.getGroupDiscountPercent())\\n                .divide(new BigDecimal(\\\"100\\\"), 2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);\\n            totalDiscount = totalDiscount.add(tierDiscount);\\n\\n            for (CartItem item : tierItems) {\\n                BigDecimal ratio = tierSubtotal.signum() == 0\\n                    ? BigDecimal.ZERO\\n                    : lineAmount(item).divide(tierSubtotal, 8, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);\\n                BigDecimal itemDiscount = tierDiscount.multiply(ratio).setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);\\n                itemDiscounts.put(item.getId(), new Money(itemDiscount, currency));\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        Money subtotal = new Money(subtotalAmount.setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP), currency);\\n        Money discount = new Money(totalDiscount.setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP), currency);\\n        Money total = new Money(subtotal.amount().subtract(discount.amount()).setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP), currency);\\n        cart.setDiscountAmount(discount);\\n\\n        return new CartPricingResult(subtotal, discount, total, itemDiscounts);\\n    }\\n\\n    private String pricingCacheKey(Long slotId) {\\n        return \\\"pricing:slot:\\\" + slotId;\\n    }\\n\\n    private BigDecimal lineAmount(CartItem item) {\\n        return item.getBasePrice().amount().multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(item.getQuantity()));\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_2CIfRI5Sam612TRs4mPmuEkd"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T14:00:04.343Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/SeatAvailabilityService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.AvailableSeatResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.GaTierAvailabilityResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockState;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.mapper.SeatMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.GaInventoryClaimRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis.GaInventoryRedisService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PricingTierDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.SlotSummaryDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport java.util.function.Function;\\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class SeatAvailabilityService {\\n\\n    private final SlotValidationService slotValidationService;\\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\\n    private final CartPricingService cartPricingService;\\n    private final SeatMapper seatMapper;\\n    private final GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService;\\n    private final GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository;\\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\\n\\n    public SeatAvailabilityService(\\n        SlotValidationService slotValidationService,\\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\\n        CartPricingService cartPricingService,\\n        SeatMapper seatMapper,\\n        GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService,\\n        GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository,\\n        StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate\\n    ) {\\n        this.slotValidationService = slotValidationService;\\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\\n        this.cartPricingService = cartPricingService;\\n        this.seatMapper = seatMapper;\\n        this.gaInventoryRedisService = gaInventoryRedisService;\\n        this.gaInventoryClaimRepository = gaInventoryClaimRepository;\\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\\n    }\\n\\n    public AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse getAvailability(Long slotId) {\\n        SlotSummaryDto slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(slotId);\\n        List<PricingTierDto> tiers = cartPricingService.getSlotPricingCached(slotId);\\n        Map<Long, PricingTierDto> tierMap = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(PricingTierDto::tierId, Function.identity()));\\n\\n        if (slot.seatingMode() == SeatingMode.RESERVED) {\\n            List<AvailableSeatResponse> seats = seatRepository.findAvailableForSlot(slotId, java.time.Instant.now())\\n                .stream()\\n                .map(seat -> {\\n                    PricingTierDto tier = tierMap.get(seat.getPricingTierId());\\n                    String tierName = tier == null ? null : tier.tierName();\\n                    BigDecimal amount = tier == null ? BigDecimal.ZERO : tier.price().amount();\\n                    String currency = tier == null ? \\\"INR\\\" : tier.price().currency();\\n                    return seatMapper.toAvailableSeatResponse(seat, tierName, amount, currency);\\n                })\\n                .toList();\\n            return new AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse(slotId, slot.seatingMode(), seats, List.of());\\n        }\\n\\n        List<GaTierAvailabilityResponse> gaTiers = tiers.stream()\\n            .map(tier -> {\\n                Long available = gaInventoryRedisService.getCurrent(slotId, tier.tierId());\\n                if (available == null) {\\n                    long confirmed = gaInventoryClaimRepository.countByShowSlotIdAndPricingTierIdAndLockState(slotId, tier.tierId(), SeatLockState.CONFIRMED);\\n                    available = Math.max(0, tier.quota() - confirmed);\\n                }\\n                boolean blocked = Boolean.TRUE.equals(stringRedisTemplate.hasKey(\\\"tier:blocked:\\\" + slotId + \\\":\\\" + tier.tierId()));\\n                return new GaTierAvailabilityResponse(\\n                    tier.tierId(),\\n                    tier.tierName(),\\n                    tier.quota(),\\n                    available,\\n                    new Money(tier.price().amount(), tier.price().currency()),\\n                    blocked\\n                );\\n            })\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        return new AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse(slotId, slot.seatingMode(), List.of(), gaTiers);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_W4inrNV2JvN4fXI0ZnfB4A8x"
  }
}

com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.api.dto.response.GaTierAvailabilityResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockState;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.mapper.SeatMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.GaInventoryClaimRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis.GaInventoryRedisService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PricingTierDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.SlotSummaryDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport java.util.function.Function;\\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class SeatAvailabilityService {\\n\\n    private final SlotValidationService slotValidationService;\\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\\n    private final CartPricingService cartPricingService;\\n    private final SeatMapper seatMapper;\\n    private final GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService;\\n    private final GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository;\\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\\n\\n    public SeatAvailabilityService(\\n        SlotValidationService slotValidationService,\\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\\n        CartPricingService cartPricingService,\\n        SeatMapper seatMapper,\\n        GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService,\\n        GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository,\\n        StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate\\n    ) {\\n        this.slotValidationService = slotValidationService;\\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\\n        this.cartPricingService = cartPricingService;\\n        this.seatMapper = seatMapper;\\n        this.gaInventoryRedisService = gaInventoryRedisService;\\n        this.gaInventoryClaimRepository = gaInventoryClaimRepository;\\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\\n    }\\n\\n    public AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse getAvailability(Long slotId) {\\n        SlotSummaryDto slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(slotId);\\n        List<PricingTierDto> tiers = cartPricingService.getSlotPricingCached(slotId);\\n        Map<Long, PricingTierDto> tierMap = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(PricingTierDto::tierId, Function.identity()));\\n\\n        if (slot.seatingMode() == SeatingMode.RESERVED) {\\n            List<AvailableSeatResponse> seats = seatRepository.findAvailableForSlot(slotId, java.time.Instant.now())\\n                .stream()\\n                .map(seat -> {\\n                    PricingTierDto tier = tierMap.get(seat.getPricingTierId());\\n                    String tierName = tier == null ? null : tier.tierName();\\n                    BigDecimal amount = tier == null ? BigDecimal.ZERO : tier.price().amount();\\n                    String currency = tier == null ? \\\"INR\\\" : tier.price().currency();\\n                    return seatMapper.toAvailableSeatResponse(seat, tierName, amount, currency);\\n                })\\n                .toList();\\n            return new AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse(slotId, slot.seatingMode(), seats, List.of());\\n        }\\n\\n        List<GaTierAvailabilityResponse> gaTiers = tiers.stream()\\n            .map(tier -> {\\n                Long available = gaInventoryRedisService.getCurrent(slotId, tier.tierId());\\n                if (available == null) {\\n                    long confirmed = gaInventoryClaimRepository.countByShowSlotIdAndPricingTierIdAndLockState(slotId, tier.tierId(), SeatLockState.CONFIRMED);\\n                    available = Math.max(0, tier.quota() - confirmed);\\n                }\\n                boolean blocked = Boolean.TRUE.equals(stringRedisTemplate.hasKey(\\\"tier:blocked:\\\" + slotId + \\\":\\\" + tier.tierId()));\\n                return new GaTierAvailabilityResponse(\\n                    tier.tierId(),\\n                    tier.tierName(),\\n                    tier.quota(),\\n                    available,\\n                    new Money(tier.price().amount(), tier.price().currency()),\\n                    blocked\\n                );\\n            })\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        return new AvailableSeatsEnvelopeResponse(slotId, slot.seatingMode(), List.of(), gaTiers);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
